A formalization of Staged Specification Logic for Verifying Higher-Order Imperative Programs (FM 2024). 
From Coq Require Import Classes.RelationClasses.
From Coq Require Morphisms Program.Basics.


[Loading ML file ring_plugin.cmxs (using legacy method) ... done]

Module Fmap := LibSepFmap.

From SLF Require Export Extra Heap Tactics.

Local Open Scope string_scope.
(* Local Open Scope nat_scope. *)
Local Open Scope Z_scope.
Local Open Scope list_scope.

Set Implicit Arguments.

Programs

The representation of programs and the use of substitution are mostly reused from SLF. 
Definition ident : Type := string.
Definition ident_eq := String.string_dec.

Definition loc := nat.

Inductive val :=
  | vunit : val
  | vint : Z -> val
  | vfun : ident -> expr -> val
  | vfix : ident -> ident -> expr -> val
  | vloc : loc -> val
  | vtup : val -> val -> val
  | vstr : string -> val
  | vbool : bool -> val
  | vlist : list val -> val

with expr : Type :=
  | pvar (x: ident)
  | pval (v: val)
  | plet (x: ident) (e1 e2: expr)
  | pfix (f: ident) (x: ident) (e: expr)
  | pfun (x: ident) (e: expr)
  | padd (x y: val)
  | pminus (x y: val)
  | passert (b: val)
  | pref (v: val)
  | pderef (v: val)
  | passign (x: val) (v: val)
  | pif (x: val) (e1: expr) (e2: expr)
  | papp (x: expr) (a: val).


Inhab val


Inhab val

  
exists _ : val, True

  
True

  constructor.
Qed.

Fixpoint subst (y:ident) (w:val) (e:expr) : expr :=
  let aux t := subst y w t in
  let if_y_eq x t1 t2 := if ident_eq x y then t1 else t2 in
  match e with
  | pval v => pval v
  | padd x y => padd x y
  | pminus x y => pminus x y
  | pvar x => if_y_eq x (pval w) e
  | passert b => passert b
  | pderef r => pderef r
  | passign x y => passign x y
  | pref v => pref v
  | pfun x t1 => pfun x (if_y_eq x t1 (aux t1))
  | pfix f x t1 => pfix f x (if_y_eq f t1 (if_y_eq x t1 (aux t1)))
  | papp e v => papp e v
  | plet x t1 t2 => plet x (aux t1) (if_y_eq x t2 (aux t2))
  | pif t0 t1 t2 => pif t0 (aux t1) (aux t2)
  end.

Module Val.
  Definition val := val.
End Val.
SLF's heap theory as a functor. 
Module Export Heap := Heap.HeapSetup(Val).

Definition empty_heap : heap := Fmap.empty.

Definition precond := hprop.
Definition postcond := val -> hprop.

Inductive result : Type :=
  | norm : val -> result.

Staged formulae

Deeply embedded due to uninterpreted functions, which cannot immediately be given a semantics without an environment. 
Inductive flow :=
  | req : precond -> flow -> flow
  | ens : postcond -> flow
  | seq : flow -> flow -> flow
  | fex : forall A, (A -> flow) -> flow
  | fall : forall A, (A -> flow) -> flow
  | unk : ident -> val -> val -> flow
  | disj : flow -> flow -> flow.
An ens which doesn't have a useful return value. 
Definition ens_ H := ens (fun r => \[r = vunit] \* H).
This carries more information than ens (fun _ ⇒ H), which has an arbitrary return value. 
Definition empty := ens_ \[True].

Notation req_ H := (req H empty).
Function environments, for interpreting unknown functions. ufun is a HOAS way of substituting into a staged formula, which otherwise doesn't support this due to the shallow embedding that hprop uses. 
Definition ufun := val -> val -> flow.
Definition env := fmap ident (option ufun).

Definition empty_env : env := Fmap.empty.

Declare Scope flow_scope.
Open Scope flow_scope.

Infix ";;" := seq (at level 80, right associativity) : flow_scope.

Notation "'∃' x1 .. xn , H" :=
  (fex (fun x1 => .. (fex (fun xn => H)) ..))
  (at level 39, x1 binder, H at level 50, right associativity,
   format "'[' '∃' '/ '  x1  ..  xn , '/ '  H ']'",
   only printing) : flow_scope.

Notation "'∀' x1 .. xn , H" :=
  (fall (fun x1 => .. (fall (fun xn => H)) ..))
  (at level 39, x1 binder, H at level 50, right associativity,
   format "'[' '∀' '/ '  x1  ..  xn , '/ '  H ']'",
   only printing) : flow_scope.

Notation "f '$' '(' x ',' r ')'" := (unk f x r)
  (at level 80, format "f '$' '(' x ','  r ')'", only printing) : flow_scope.

(* Notation "'ens' '[' r ']' Q" := (ens (fun r => Q))
  (at level 80, format "'ens' '\[' r '\]' Q" , only printing) : flow_scope. *)
(* square brackets will conflict with format notation for boxes https://coq.inria.fr/doc/V8.20.0/refman/user-extensions/syntax-extensions.html#displaying-symbolic-notations:~:text=well%2Dbracketed%20pairs%20of%20tokens%20of%20the%20form%20%27%5B%20%27%20and%20%27%5D%27 *)

Notation "'ens' r '.' Q" := (ens (fun r => Q))
  (at level 80, format "'ens'  r '.'  Q" , only printing) : flow_scope.

Interpretation of a staged formula

An Inductive definition is used because the rule for unknown functions is not structurally recursive. 
Inductive satisfies : env -> heap -> heap -> result -> flow -> Prop :=

  | s_req env p (h1 h2:heap) r f
    (H: forall hp hr, (* the heap satisfying p, and the remaining heap *)
      p hp ->
      h1 = Fmap.union hr hp ->
      Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
      satisfies env hr h2 r f) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (req p f)

  | s_ens env q h1 h2 r
    (H: exists v h3,
      r = norm v /\
      q v h3 /\
      h2 = Fmap.union h1 h3 /\
      Fmap.disjoint h1 h3) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (ens q)

  | s_seq env f1 f2 h1 h2 r
    (H: exists h3 r1,
      satisfies env h1 h3 r1 f1 /\
      satisfies env h3 h2 r f2) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (seq f1 f2)

  | s_fex env h1 h2 r (A:Type) (f:A->flow)
    (H: exists v,
      satisfies env h1 h2 r (f v)) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (@fex A f)

  | s_fall env h1 h2 r (A:Type) (f:A->flow)
    (H: forall v,
      satisfies env h1 h2 r (f v)) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (@fall A f)

  | s_unk env h1 h2 r fn f x
    (He: Fmap.read env fn = Some f)
    (Hr: satisfies env h1 h2 (norm r) (f x r)) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 (norm r) (unk fn x r)

  | s_disj_l env h1 h2 r f1 f2
    (H: satisfies env h1 h2 r f1) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (disj f1 f2)

  | s_disj_r env h1 h2 r f1 f2
    (H: satisfies env h1 h2 r f2) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (disj f1 f2).

Notation "env ','  h1 ','  h2 ','  r  '|=' f" :=
  (satisfies env h1 h2 r f) (at level 30, only printing).
The result of a staged formula, written in the paper as Φ[r]. Because it relates a formula and a value here (and not a variable, as in the paper), we need a model for the formula to talk about the value. 
Definition flow_res (f:flow) (v:val) : Prop :=
  forall h1 h2 env v1, satisfies env h1 h2 (norm v1) f -> v1 = v.

Definition flow_res_in_env (f:flow) (v:val) env : Prop :=
  forall h1 h2 v1, satisfies env h1 h2 (norm v1) f -> v1 = v.

Definition has_no_result f :=
  forall env h1 h2 r, satisfies env h1 h2 r f -> r = norm vunit.

Entailment

This is defined directly in terms of the semantics, in contrast to the paper's syntactic definition. 
(* TODO the paper's definition should later be implemented as an Inductive here and proved sound with respect to the lemmas we can write using this semantic definition *)
Definition entails_under env f1 f2 :=
  forall h1 h2 r,
    satisfies env h1 h2 r f1 -> satisfies env h1 h2 r f2.

Definition entails (f1 f2:flow) : Prop :=
  forall env h1 h2 r, satisfies env h1 h2 r f1 -> satisfies env h1 h2 r f2.

Infix "⊑" := entails (at level 90, right associativity) : flow_scope.

Notation "env '⊢' f1 '⊑' f2" :=
  (entails_under env f1 f2) (at level 90, only printing) : flow_scope.

(* Unset Printing Notations. Set Printing Coercions. Set Printing Parentheses. *)
(* Check (forall f1 f2 f3, f1 ;; f3 ⊑ f2). *)

Definition bientails (f1 f2:flow) : Prop :=
  forall h1 h2 r env,
    satisfies env h1 h2 r f1 <-> satisfies env h1 h2 r f2.

Rewriting

Reflexive entails


Reflexive entails

  
forall (x : flow) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x

  
x: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= x
env0, h1, h2, r |= x

  exact H.
Qed.


Transitive entails


Transitive entails

  
forall x y z : flow,
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= y) ->
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= z) ->
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= z

  
x, y, z: flow
H: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= y
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= z
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: env0, h1, h2, r |= x
env0, h1, h2, r |= z

  auto.
Qed.


PreOrder entails


PreOrder entails

  
Reflexive entails
Transitive entails

  
Transitive entails

  apply entails_trans.
Qed.


forall env : env, Reflexive (entails_under env)


forall env : env, Reflexive (entails_under env)

  
forall (env : env) (x : flow) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x

  
env0: env
x: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= x
env0, h1, h2, r |= x

  exact H.
Qed.


forall env : env, Transitive (entails_under env)


forall env : env, Transitive (entails_under env)

  
forall (env : env) (x y z : flow),
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= y) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= z) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= z

  
env0: env
x, y, z: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env0, h1, h2, r |= x -> env0, h1, h2, r |= y
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env0, h1, h2, r |= y -> env0, h1, h2, r |= z
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: env0, h1, h2, r |= x
env0, h1, h2, r |= z

  auto.
Qed.


forall env : env, PreOrder (entails_under env)


forall env : env, PreOrder (entails_under env)

  
env0: env
Reflexive (entails_under env0)
env0: env
Transitive (entails_under env0)

  
env0: env
Transitive (entails_under env0)

  apply entails_under_trans.
Qed.


Equivalence bientails


Equivalence bientails

  
Reflexive bientails
Symmetric bientails
Transitive bientails

  
Reflexive bientails
 
forall x : flow, bientails x x

    
forall (x : flow) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result)
  (env : env),
env, h1, h2, r |= x <-> env, h1, h2, r |= x

    reflexivity.
  
Symmetric bientails
 
forall x y : flow, bientails x y -> bientails y x

    
forall x y : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (env : env),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x <-> env, h1, h2, r |= y) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (env : env),
env, h1, h2, r |= y <-> env, h1, h2, r |= x

    
x, y: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (env : env),
env, h1, h2, r |= x <-> env, h1, h2, r |= y
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
env0, h1, h2, r |= x <-> env0, h1, h2, r |= y

    auto.
  
Transitive bientails

bientails x y -> bientails y z -> bientails x z

Infix "====>" := Morphisms.respectful (at level 80, right associativity).
Notation Proper := Morphisms.Proper.
Notation respectful := Morphisms.respectful.
Notation impl := Program.Basics.impl.
Notation flip := Basics.flip.
Incantations for setoid rewriting 
Section Proprium.
This reflects how entailment is contravariant in the antecedent and covariant in the consequent 
  
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  entails

  
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  entails

    
forall x y : flow,
flip
  (fun f1 f2 : flow =>
   forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
   env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) x y ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0) ->
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0) ->
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0

    
x, y: flow
H: flip
  (fun f1 f2 : flow =>
   forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
   env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) x
  y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0
H1: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H2: env0, h1, h2, r |= y
env0, h1, h2, r |= y0

    auto.
  Qed.

  
forall env : env,
Proper
  (respectful (flip (entails_under env))
     (respectful (entails_under env) impl))
  (entails_under env)

  
forall env : env,
Proper
  (respectful (flip (entails_under env))
     (respectful (entails_under env) impl))
  (entails_under env)

    
forall (env : env) (x y : flow),
flip
  (fun f1 f2 : flow =>
   forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
   env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) x y ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0

    
env0: env
x, y: flow
H: flip
  (fun f1 f2 : flow =>
   forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
   env0, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env0, h1, h2, r |= f2)
  x y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env0, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env0, h1, h2, r |= y0
H1: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env0, h1, h2, r |= x -> env0, h1, h2, r |= x0
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H2: env0, h1, h2, r |= y
env0, h1, h2, r |= y0

    auto.
  Qed.

  
Proper
  (respectful bientails (respectful bientails iff))
  entails

  
Proper
  (respectful bientails (respectful bientails iff))
  entails

    
forall x y : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (env : env),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x <-> env, h1, h2, r |= y) ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (env : env),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x0 <-> env, h1, h2, r |= y0) ->
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0) <->
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0)

    
x, y: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (env : env),
env, h1, h2, r |= x <-> env, h1, h2, r |= y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (env : env),

entails is proper wrt satisfies 
  
Proper
  (respectful eq
     (respectful eq
        (respectful eq
           (respectful eq (respectful entails impl)))))
  satisfies

  
Proper
  (respectful eq
     (respectful eq
        (respectful eq
           (respectful eq (respectful entails impl)))))
  satisfies

    
forall x y : env,
x = y ->
forall x0 y0 : heap,
x0 = y0 ->
forall x1 y1 : heap,
x1 = y1 ->
forall x2 y2 : result,
x2 = y2 ->
forall x3 y3 : flow,
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y3) ->
x, x0, x1, x2 |= x3 -> y, y0, y1, y2 |= y3

    
x, y: env
H: x = y
x0, y0: heap
H0: x0 = y0
x1, y1: heap
H1: x1 = y1
x2, y2: result
H2: x2 = y2
x3, y3: flow
H3: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y3
H4: x, x0, x1, x2 |= x3
y, y0, y1, y2 |= y3
 
y: env
y0, y1: heap
y2: result
x3, y3: flow
H3: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y3
H4: y, y0, y1, y2 |= x3
y, y0, y1, y2 |= y3

    auto.
  Qed.

forall (env : env) (x y : heap),
x = y ->
forall x0 y0 : heap,
x0 = y0 ->
forall x1 y1 : result,
x1 = y1 ->
forall x2 y2 : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x2 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y2) ->
env, x, x0, x1 |= x2 -> env, y, y0, y1 |= y2

    
env0: env
x, y: heap
H: x = y
x0, y0: heap
H0: x0 = y0
x1, y1: result
H1: x1 = y1
x2, y2: flow
H2: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env0, h1, h2, r |= x2 -> env0, h1, h2, r |= y2
H3: env0, x, x0, x1 |= x2
env0, y, y0, y1 |= y2
 
env0: env
y, y0: heap
y1: result
x2, y2: flow
H2: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env0, h1, h2, r |= x2 -> env0, h1, h2, r |= y2
H3: env0, y, y0, y1 |= x2
env0, y, y0, y1 |= y2

    auto.
  Qed.

env, h1, h2, r |= x <-> env, h1, h2, r |= y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (env : env),
env, h1, h2, r |= x0 <-> env, h1, h2, r |= y0
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
h3: heap
r1: result
H2: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= x
H3: env0, h3, h2, r |= x0
exists r1 : result,
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= y /\ env0, h3, h2, r |= y0

End Proprium.

Inversion/introduction lemmas

forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (H : hprop)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H -> r = norm vunit


forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (H : hprop)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H -> r = norm vunit

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
H: hprop
r: result
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H
r = norm vunit

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
H: hprop
r: result
H0: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
H: hprop
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
H2: (\[v = vunit] \* H) h3
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
H: hprop
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
H2: v = vunit /\ H h3
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
H: hprop
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
H0: v = vunit
H2: H h3
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit

  congruence.
Qed.


forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (P : Prop)
  (r : result),
P -> env, h1, h2, r |= req_ \[P] -> r = norm vunit

  (r : result),

r = norm vunit

r: result

H0: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
\[P] hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= empty
r = norm vunit

h1, h2: heap

\[P] hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= empty
\[P] empty_heap

h1 = hr \u hp ->

h1 = h1 \u empty_heap

H0: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
\[P] hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= empty
H1: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* \[True]) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit
 
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
P: Prop
r: result
H: P
H0: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
\[P] hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= empty
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H2: r = norm v
H1: (\[v = vunit] \* \[True]) h3
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
P: Prop
r: result
H: P
H0: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
\[P] hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= empty
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H2: r = norm v
H1: v = vunit /\ \[True] h3
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
P: Prop
r: result
H: P
H0: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
\[P] hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= empty
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H2: r = norm v
H1: v = vunit
H4: \[True] h3
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit

  congruence.
Qed.


forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens _. \[]) -> h1 = h2


forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens _. \[]) -> h1 = h2

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens _. \[])
h1 = h2

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  \[] h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
h1 = h2

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H: \[] h3
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
h1 = h2

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H: h3 = Fmap.empty
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
h1 = h2

  
env0: env
h1: heap
v: val
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
h1 = h1 \u Fmap.empty

  fmap_eq.
Qed.


forall (env : env) (h1 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h1, r |= (ens _. \[])


forall (env : env) (h1 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h1, r |= (ens _. \[])

  
env0: env
h1: heap
r: result
env0, h1, h1, r |= (ens _. \[])

  
env0: env
h1: heap
r: result
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  \[] h3 /\ h1 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
env0: env
h1: heap
v: val
exists (v0 : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm v = norm v0 /\
  \[] h3 /\ h1 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
env0: env
h1: heap
v: val
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  norm v = norm v /\
  \[] h3 /\ h1 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
env0: env
h1: heap
v: val
norm v = norm v /\
\[] empty_heap /\
h1 = h1 \u empty_heap /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 empty_heap

  
env0: env
h1: heap
v: val
\[] empty_heap

  constructor.
Qed.


forall (P : Prop) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens _. \[P]) -> P /\ h1 = h2


forall (P : Prop) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens _. \[P]) -> P /\ h1 = h2

  
P: Prop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens _. \[P])
P /\ h1 = h2

  
P: Prop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  \[P] h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P /\ h1 = h2

  
P: Prop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H: \[P] h3
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P /\ h1 = h2

  
P: Prop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
x: P
H2: \[] h3
P /\ h1 = h2

  
P: Prop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
H0: r = norm v
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
H1: h2 = h1 \u Fmap.empty
x: P
P /\ h1 = h2

  intuition.
Qed.


forall (P : val -> Prop) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (v : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens a. \[P a]) ->
P v /\ h1 = h2


forall (P : val -> Prop) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (v : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens a. \[P a]) ->
P v /\ h1 = h2

  
P: val -> Prop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
H: env0, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens a. \[P a])
P v /\ h1 = h2

  
P: val -> Prop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
H: exists (v0 : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm v = norm v0 /\
  \[P v0] h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P v /\ h1 = h2
 
P: val -> Prop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
v, v0: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: norm v = norm v0
H: \[P v0] h3
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P v /\ h1 = h2

  
P: val -> Prop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
v, v0: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: norm v = norm v0
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
x: P v0
H2: \[] h3
P v /\ h1 = h2

  
P: val -> Prop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
v, v0: val
H0: norm v = norm v0
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
H1: h2 = h1 \u Fmap.empty
x: P v0
P v /\ h1 = h2

  
P: val -> Prop
env0: env
h1: heap
v0: val
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
x: P v0
P v0 /\ h1 = h1 \u Fmap.empty

  intuition.
Qed.

forall H : hprop, has_no_result (ens_ H)


forall H : hprop, has_no_result (ens_ H)

  
forall (H : hprop) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H -> r = norm vunit

  
H: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H
r = norm vunit

  applys ens_void_inv H0.
Qed.

Tactics for reasoning about entailments

Ltac felim H :=
  match type of H with
  | satisfies _ _ _ _ (fex _) => inverts H as H
  | satisfies _ _ _ _ (_ ;; _) => inverts H as H
  | satisfies _ _ _ _ (ens (fun _ => \[_])) => apply ens_pure_inv in H
  (* | satisfies _ (req \[]) _ _ _ => apply req_empty_inv in H; subst *)
  (* | satisfies _ (unk _ _ _) _ _ _ => inverts H as H *)
  end.

Ltac finv H :=
  match type of H with
  | \[] _ => apply hempty_inv in H
  | \[_] _ => apply hpure_inv in H as (?&?)
  | (_~~>_) _ => apply hsingle_inv in H
  | (_ \* _) _ => apply hstar_inv in H as (?&?&?&?&?&?)
  | (\[_] \* _) _ => rewrite hstar_hpure_l
  | (_ \* \[_]) _ => rewrite hstar_hpure_r
  end.

Ltac fintro :=
  match goal with
  | |- satisfies _ _ _ _ (ens (fun _ => \[_])) => apply ens_pure_intro
  | |- satisfies _ _ _ _ (ens (fun _ => \[])) => apply ens_empty_intro
  | |- \[] _ => apply hempty_intro
  | |- \[_] _ => apply hpure_intro
  | |- (_ \* _) (_ \u _) => apply hstar_intro
  | |- (\[_] \* \[_]) _ => idtac "use rewrite hstar_hpure_l or hstar_hpure_r"
  | |- (\[_] \* _) _ => rewrite hstar_hpure_l
  | |- (_ \* \[_]) _ => rewrite hstar_hpure_r
  (* | |- satisfies _ (req \[]) _ _ _ => apply req_empty_intro *)
  (* | |- satisfies _ (req \[];; _) _ _ _ => apply seq_req_emp_intro_l *)
  end.

  Ltac resolve_fn_in_env :=
    match goal with
    | |- Fmap.read (Fmap.update _ ?k (Some _)) ?k = _ =>
      rewrite fmap_read_update; auto
    | |- Fmap.read (Fmap.single ?k (Some _)) ?k = _ =>
      rewrite Fmap.read_single; reflexivity
    | |- ?g => idtac "resolve_fn_in_env could not solve:"; idtac g
    end.

(* Ltac fexists v :=
  match goal with
  | |- satisfies _ (fex _) _ _ _ => unfold fex; exists v
  end. *)

Entailment/normalization rules

Covariance of ens 
forall (Q1 Q2 : val -> hprop) (env : env)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
(forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q1 r) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)


forall (Q1 Q2 : val -> hprop) (env : env)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
(forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q1 r) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

  
Q1, Q2: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q1 r)
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

  
Q1, Q2: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
H3: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  Q1 v h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

  
Q1, Q2: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
H3: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  Q1 v h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  Q2 v h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
Q1, Q2: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H1: Q1 v h3
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  Q2 v h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
Q1, Q2: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H1: Q1 v h3
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  r = norm v /\
  Q2 v h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
Q1, Q2: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H1: Q1 v h3
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm v /\
Q2 v h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
Q1, Q2: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H1: Q1 v h3
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
Q2 v h3

  
Q1, Q2: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H1: Q1 v h3
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
Q1 v h3

  easy.
Qed.


forall Q1 Q2 : val -> hprop,
(forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v) ->
ens r. Q1 r ⊑ ens r. Q2 r


forall Q1 Q2 : val -> hprop,
(forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v) ->
ens r. Q1 r ⊑ ens r. Q2 r

  
forall Q1 Q2 : val -> hprop,
(forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v) ->
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q1 r) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

  
Q1, Q2: val -> hprop
H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q1 r)
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

  applys* satisfies_ens.
Qed.


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
H1 ==> H2 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H2


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
H1 ==> H2 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H2

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: H1 ==> H2
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H1
env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H2

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: H1 ==> H2
H3: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H2
 
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: H1 ==> H2
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H3: (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h3
H4: h2 = h1 \u h3
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H2

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: H1 ==> H2
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H3: (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h3
H4: h2 = h1 \u h3
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H2) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: H1 ==> H2
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H3: (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h3
H4: h2 = h1 \u h3
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  r = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H2) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: H1 ==> H2
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H3: (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h3
H4: h2 = h1 \u h3
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm v /\
(\[v = vunit] \* H2) h3 /\
h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: H1 ==> H2
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H3: (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h3
H4: h2 = h1 \u h3
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
(\[v = vunit] \* H2) h3

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: H1 ==> H2
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H3: v = vunit /\ H1 h3
H4: h2 = h1 \u h3
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
(\[v = vunit] \* H2) h3

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: H1 ==> H2
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: r = norm v
H3: v = vunit /\ H1 h3
H4: h2 = h1 \u h3
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
v = vunit /\ H2 h3

  intuition.
Qed.


forall H1 H2 : hprop, H1 ==> H2 -> ens_ H1 ⊑ ens_ H2


forall H1 H2 : hprop, H1 ==> H2 -> ens_ H1 ⊑ ens_ H2

  
forall H1 H2 : hprop,
H1 ==> H2 ->
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H2

  
H1, H2: hprop
H: H1 ==> H2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H1
env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H2

  applys* satisfies_ens_void H.
Qed.
Rule EntEns from the paper 
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f1 f2 : flow),
H1 ==> H2 -> f1 ⊑ f2 -> ens_ H1;; f1 ⊑ ens_ H2;; f2


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f1 f2 : flow),
H1 ==> H2 -> f1 ⊑ f2 -> ens_ H1;; f1 ⊑ ens_ H2;; f2

  
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f1 f2 : flow),
H1 ==> H2 ->
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) ->
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; f1) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; f2)

  
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H1 ==> H2
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; f1)
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; f2)

  
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H1 ==> H2
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H1 /\
  env0, h3, h2, r |= f1
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; f2)
 
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H1 ==> H2
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H1
H5: env0, h3, h2, r |= f1
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; f2)

  
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H1 ==> H2
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H2
H5: env0, h3, h2, r |= f1
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; f2)

  
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H1 ==> H2
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H2
H5: env0, h3, h2, r |= f1
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H2 /\ env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
 
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H1 ==> H2
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H2
H5: env0, h3, h2, r |= f1
exists r1 : result,
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H2 /\ env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
 
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H1 ==> H2
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H2
H5: env0, h3, h2, r |= f1
env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H2 /\ env0, h3, h2, r |= f2

  intuition.
Qed.
Contravariance of req 
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result) (f : flow),
H2 ==> H1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result) (f : flow),
H2 ==> H1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f
forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
H2 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f
hH1, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H3: H2 hH1
h1 = hr \u hH1 ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hH1 -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f

  (* hH1 is the heap that satisfies H1 *)
  (* hr is the starting heap of the continuation *)
  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f
hH1, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H3: H1 hH1
h1 = hr \u hH1 ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hH1 -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f

  
H1, H2: hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
hH1, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: h1 = hr \u hH1 ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hH1 -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f
H3: H1 hH1
h1 = hr \u hH1 ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hH1 -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f

  intuition.
Qed.


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f : flow),
H2 ==> H1 -> req H1 f ⊑ req H2 f


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f : flow),
H2 ==> H1 -> req H1 f ⊑ req H2 f

  
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f : flow),
H2 ==> H1 ->
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f

  applys* satisfies_req H1.
Qed.
Rule EntReq from the paper 
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f1 f2 : flow),
H2 ==> H1 -> f1 ⊑ f2 -> req H1 f1 ⊑ req H2 f2


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f1 f2 : flow),
H2 ==> H1 -> f1 ⊑ f2 -> req H1 f1 ⊑ req H2 f2

  
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f1 f2 : flow),
H2 ==> H1 ->
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) ->
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f2

  
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: env0, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f1
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f2

  
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: env0, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f1
forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
H2 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f2
 
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: env0, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f1
hH2, h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H2 hH2 ->
h1 = h3 \u hH2 ->
Fmap.disjoint h3 hH2 -> env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
 
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: env0, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f1
hH2, h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H4: H2 hH2
H5: h1 = h3 \u hH2
H6: Fmap.disjoint h3 hH2
env0, h3, h2, r |= f2

  
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
hH2, h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H4: H2 hH2
H5: h1 = h3 \u hH2
H6: Fmap.disjoint h3 hH2
H3: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f1
env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
 specializes H3 hH2 h3.
Qed.
seq is associative 
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result)
  (f1 f2 f3 : flow),
env, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2;; f3) <->
env, h1, h2, r |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)


forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result)
  (f1 f2 f3 : flow),
env, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2;; f3) <->
env, h1, h2, r |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f1, f2, f3: flow
env0, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2;; f3) <->
env0, h1, h2, r |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f1, f2, f3: flow
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2;; f3)
env0, h1, h2, r |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f1, f2, f3: flow
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)
env0, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2;; f3)

  
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f1, f2, f3: flow
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2;; f3)
env0, h1, h2, r |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)
 
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f1, f2, f3: flow
H: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= f1 /\
  env0, h3, h2, r |= (f2;; f3)
env0, h1, h2, r |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)
 
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f1, f2, f3: flow
h3: heap
r1: result

H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= (f2;; f3)
env0, h1, h2, r |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)

  env0, h3, h4, r1 |= f2 /\ env0, h4, h2, r |= f3

forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
bientails (f1;; f2;; f3) ((f1;; f2);; f3)


forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
bientails (f1;; f2;; f3) ((f1;; f2);; f3)

  
f1, f2, f3: flow
bientails (f1;; f2;; f3) ((f1;; f2);; f3)

  split; intros; now apply seq_assoc.
Qed.


forall (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun))
  (h1 h2 : heap) (v x : val) (f1 : ufun) (f : ident)
  (r : result),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v)) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v


forall (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun))
  (h1 h2 : heap) (v x : val) (f1 : ufun) (f : ident)
  (r : result),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v)) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v

  
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h1, h2: heap
v, x: val
f1: ufun
f: ident
r: result
H: Fmap.read env0 f = Some f1
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v))
env0, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v

  
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h1, h2: heap
v, x: val
f1: ufun
f: ident
H: Fmap.read env0 f = Some f1
f0: ufun
H0: Fmap.read env0 f = Some f0
Hr: env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f0 x v
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f1 x v

  
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h1, h2: heap
v, x: val
f1: ufun
f: ident
H: Fmap.read env0 f = Some f1
f0: ufun
H0: Some f1 = Some f0
Hr: env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f0 x v
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f1 x v

  
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h1, h2: heap
v, x: val
f: ident
f0: ufun
H: Fmap.read env0 f = Some f0
Hr: env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f0 x v
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f0 x v

  assumption.
Qed.


forall (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun))
  (h1 h2 : heap) (v x : val) (f1 : ufun) (f : ident)
  (r : result),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v)) -> r = norm v


forall (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun))
  (h1 h2 : heap) (v x : val) (f1 : ufun) (f : ident)
  (r : result),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v)) -> r = norm v

  
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h1, h2: heap
v, x: val
f1: ufun
f: ident
r: result
H: Fmap.read env0 f = Some f1
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v))
r = norm v

  
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h1, h2: heap
v, x: val
f1: ufun
f: ident
H: Fmap.read env0 f = Some f1
f0: ufun
H0: Fmap.read env0 f = Some f0
Hr: env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f0 x v
norm v = norm v

  reflexivity.
Qed.


forall (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)) (v : val)
  (f1 : ufun) (f : ident) (x : val),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 -> env ⊢ f$(x, v) ⊑ f1 x v


forall (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)) (v : val)
  (f1 : ufun) (f : ident) (x : val),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 -> env ⊢ f$(x, v) ⊑ f1 x v

  
forall (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)) (v : val)
  (f1 : ufun) (f : ident) (x : val),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v)) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v

forall (A : Type) (f1 : flow) (f2_ctx : A -> flow),
f1;; ∀ a : A, f2_ctx a ⊑ ∀ a : A, (f1;; f2_ctx a)


forall (A : Type) (f1 : flow) (f2_ctx : A -> flow),
f1;; ∀ a : A, f2_ctx a ⊑ ∀ a : A, (f1;; f2_ctx a)

  
forall (A : Type) (f1 : flow) (f2_ctx : A -> flow)
  (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; ∀ a : A, f2_ctx a) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (∀ a : A, (f1;; f2_ctx a))

  
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; ∀ a : A, f2_ctx a)
env0, h1, h2, r |= (∀ a : A, (f1;; f2_ctx a))

  
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; ∀ a : A, f2_ctx a)
forall v : A, env0, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2_ctx v)
 
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; ∀ a : A, f2_ctx a)
v: A
env0, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2_ctx v)

env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: A
H: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= f1 /\
  env0, h3, h2, r |= (∀ a : A, f2_ctx a)
env0, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2_ctx v)

r1: result

H0: forall v : A, env0, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
env0, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v

  
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: A
h3: heap
r1: result
H: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
H0: env0, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v

  auto.
Qed.
Compaction rule 1 from the paper 
forall f : flow,
bientails (ens_ \[False]) (ens_ \[False];; f)


forall f : flow,
bientails (ens_ \[False]) (ens_ \[False];; f)

  
forall (f : flow) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result)
  (env : env),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[False] <->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ \[False];; f)

  
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ \[False];; f)
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ \[False];; f)
env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]

  
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ \[False];; f)
 
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
H: False /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ \[False];; f)

    intuition. 
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ \[False];; f)
env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]

  
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ \[False];; f)
env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]
 
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
H: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ \[False] /\
  env0, h3, h2, r |= f
env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]
 
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ \[False]
H1: env0, h3, h2, r |= f
env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]

r: result
env0: env
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: False /\ h1 = h3 /\ r1 = norm vunit
H1: env0, h3, h2, r |= f
env0, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]

    intuition. }
Qed.

Reassociating req 
forall (H : precond) (f1 f2 : flow) (env : env)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (req H f1;; f2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H (f1;; f2)


forall (H : precond) (f1 f2 : flow) (env : env)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (req H f1;; f2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H (f1;; f2)

  
H: precond
f1, f2: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= (req H f1;; f2)
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H (f1;; f2)

  
H: precond
f1, f2: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= req H f1 /\
  env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H (f1;; f2)
 
H: precond
f1, f2: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= req H f1
H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H (f1;; f2)


  (* find out about req *)
  
H: precond
f1, f2: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= req H f1
H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
H hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= (f1;; f2)
 
H: precond
f1, f2: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= req H f1
H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= (f1;; f2)
 
H: precond
f1, f2: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= req H f1
H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: H hp
H3: h1 = hr \u hp
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, h2, r |= (f1;; f2)


  (* prove the req *)
  
H: precond
f1, f2: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: H hp
H3: h1 = hr \u hp
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
H1: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
H hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h3, r1 |= f1
env0, hr, h2, r |= (f1;; f2)

  
H: precond
f1, f2: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: H hp
H3: h1 = hr \u hp
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
H1: h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h3, r1 |= f1
env0, hr, h2, r |= (f1;; f2)

  
H: precond
f1, f2: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: H hp
H3: h1 = hr \u hp
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
H1: h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h3, r1 |= f1
h1 = hr \u hp
H: precond
f1, f2: flow
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= f2
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: H hp
H3: h1 = hr \u hp
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h3, r1 |= f1
env0, hr, h2, r |= (f1;; f2)

forall (H : precond) (f1 f2 : flow),
req H f1;; f2 ⊑ req H (f1;; f2)


forall (H : precond) (f1 f2 : flow),
req H f1;; f2 ⊑ req H (f1;; f2)

  
forall (H : precond) (f1 f2 : flow) (env : env)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (req H f1;; f2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H (f1;; f2)

  apply satisfies_reassoc.
Qed.
Splitting and combining reqs

req H1 (req H2 f) ⊑ req (H1 \* H2) f

env, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f

  (* contravariance means we start reasoning from the assumptions in the goal *)

h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env0, hr, h2, r |= f

H3: h1 = hH2r \u hH1

hH2, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H5: H2 hH2
H6: hH2r = hr \u hH2
H7: Fmap.disjoint hr hH2
H: Fmap.disjoint hr (hH1 \u hH2) ->
env0, hr, h2, r |= f
Fmap.disjoint hr (hH1 \u hH2)

Compaction rule 4 from the paper 
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f : flow),
bientails (req (H1 \* H2) f) (req H1 (req H2 f))


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f : flow),
bientails (req (H1 \* H2) f) (req H1 (req H2 f))

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
bientails (req (H1 \* H2) f) (req H1 (req H2 f))

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
env0, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f ->
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f)
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f) ->
env0, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
env0, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f ->
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f)
 apply norm_req_sep_split.
  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
env0, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f) ->
env0, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f
 apply norm_req_sep_combine.
Qed.
Splitting and combining ens_s 
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2) <->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

forall H1 H2 : hprop,
bientails (ens_ (H1 \* H2)) (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
bientails (ens_ (H1 \* H2)) (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

  intros; split; apply satisfies_ens_ens_void.
Qed.
Compaction rule 5 from the paper 
forall (H : hprop) (Q : postcond),
bientails (ens_ H;; ens r. Q r) (ens x. Q x \* H)

bientails (ens_ H;; ens r. Q r) (ens x. Q x \* H)

bientails (ens_ H;; ens r. Q r) (ens x. Q x \* H)

Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env

env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)

  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H /\
  env0, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap

Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
H0: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  (Q v \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; ens r. Q r)

H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
H0: exists h1 h2 : heap,
  Q v h1 /\
  H h2 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 /\ h3 = h1 \u h2
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; ens r. Q r)

Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap

H0: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H7: h3 = h0 \u h4
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; ens r. Q r)

    
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H3: Q v h0
H0: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H7: h3 = h0 \u h4
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H /\
  env0, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

    
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H3: Q v h0
H0: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H7: h3 = h0 \u h4
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists r1 : result,
  env0, h1, h1 \u h4, r1 |= ens_ H /\
  env0, h1 \u h4, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

env0, h1, h1 \u h4, norm vunit |= ens_ H /\
env0, h1 \u h4, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env0: env
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H3: Q v h0
H0: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H7: h3 = h0 \u h4
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm vunit = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H) h3 /\
  h1 \u h4 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  Q v h3 /\
  h2 = (h1 \u h4) \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint (h1 \u h4) h3

Q: postcond

h2 = (h1 \u h4) \u h0

      fmap_eq. } }
Qed.
Splitting and combining ens with results is more complex, and there does not seem to be a single equivalence. 
forall (Q1 Q2 : postcond) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens r. Q1 r);; ens r. Q2 r) ->
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)


forall (Q1 Q2 : postcond) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens r. Q1 r);; ens r. Q2 r) ->
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)

  
Q1, Q2: postcond
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r |= ((ens r. Q1 r);; ens r. Q2 r)
env0, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)

  
Q1, Q2: postcond
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= (ens r. Q1 r) /\
  env0, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)
env0, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)

  
Q1, Q2: postcond
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= (ens r. Q1 r)
H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)
env0, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)


  
Q1, Q2: postcond
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= (ens r. Q1 r)
H2: env0, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  (\exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 v) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 
Q1, Q2: postcond
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= (ens r. Q1 r)
H2: env0, h3, h2, norm v |= (ens r. Q2 r)
exists (v0 : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm v = norm v0 /\
  (\exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 v0) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
Q1, Q2: postcond
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= (ens r. Q1 r)
H2: env0, h3, h2, norm v |= (ens r. Q2 r)
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  norm v = norm v /\
  (\exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 v) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
Q1, Q2: postcond
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
h3: heap
r1: result
H2: env0, h3, h2, norm v |= (ens r. Q2 r)
H1: exists (v : val) (h4 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r1 = norm v /\
  Q1 v h4 /\ h3 = h1 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h4
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  norm v = norm v /\
  (\exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 v) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

env0: env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
h3: heap
r1: result

v0: val
h0: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: r1 = norm v0
H0: Q1 v0 h0
H1: h3 = h1 \u h0
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  norm v = norm v /\
  (\exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 v) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  reflexivity.
Qed.


forall Q1 Q2 : postcond,
(ens r. Q1 r);; ens r. Q2 r
⊑ ens r. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r


forall Q1 Q2 : postcond,
(ens r. Q1 r);; ens r. Q2 r
⊑ ens r. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r

  
forall (Q1 Q2 : postcond) (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens r. Q1 r);; ens r. Q2 r) ->
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)

  apply satisfies_ens_sep_combine.
Qed.


forall (H : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop) (env : env)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; ens r. Q r)


forall (H : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop) (env : env)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; ens r. Q r)

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)
env0, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; ens r. Q r)

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r = norm v /\
  (Q v \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; ens r. Q r)

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
H2: (Q v \* H) h3
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; ens r. Q r)

  (* h3 is the part satisfying both *)
  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
H2: exists h1 h2 : heap,
  Q v h1 /\
  H h2 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 /\ h3 = h1 \u h2
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; ens r. Q r)

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; ens r. Q r)

  (* h0 is the part satisfying Q, h4 H *)

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= (ens _. H) /\
  env0, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists r1 : result,
  env0, h1, h1 \u h4, r1 |= (ens _. H) /\
  env0, h1 \u h4, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h1 \u h4, norm v |= (ens _. H) /\
env0, h1 \u h4, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1, h1 \u h4, norm v |= (ens _. H)
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1 \u h4, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)


  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (v0 : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm v = norm v0 /\
  H h3 /\ h1 \u h4 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env0, h1 \u h4, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists h5 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  norm v = norm ?v /\
  H h5 /\ h1 \u h4 = h1 \u h5 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h5
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result

H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3

env0, h1 \u h4, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

Q: val -> hprop
env0: env

v: val

H3: h2 = h1 \u h3

H ?h3 /\ h1 \u h4 = h1 \u ?h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 ?h3

Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val

h2 = (h1 \u h4) \u h0

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1: heap
v: val
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 (h0 \u h4)
h1 \u h0 \u h4 = (h1 \u h4) \u h0

  
H: hprop

env0: env
h1: heap
v: val
h0, h4: heap

H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 (h0 \u h4)
h1 \u h0 \u h4 = h1 \u h4 \u h0

Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1: heap
v: val

H2: H h4

H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 (h0 \u h4)
h0 \u h4 = h4 \u h0

Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1: heap
v: val
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 (h0 \u h4)
H1: h0 \u h4 = h4 \u h0
h1 \u h0 \u h4 = h1 \u h4 \u h0
 
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1: heap
v: val
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 (h0 \u h4)
H1: h0 \u h4 = h4 \u h0
h1 \u h0 \u h4 = h1 \u h4 \u h0

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env0: env
h1: heap
v: val
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 (h0 \u h4)
H1: h0 \u h4 = h4 \u h0
h1 \u h4 \u h0 = h1 \u h4 \u h0

  reflexivity.
Qed.


forall (H : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop),
ens x. Q x \* H ⊑ (ens _. H);; ens r. Q r


forall (H : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop),
ens x. Q x \* H ⊑ (ens _. H);; ens r. Q r

  
forall (H : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop) (env : env)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; ens r. Q r)

  apply satisfies_ens_sep_split.
Qed.

Biabduction

Simplified definition following Compositional Shape Analysis by means of Bi-Abduction (Fig 1). 
Inductive biab : hprop -> hprop -> hprop -> hprop -> Prop :=

  | b_pts_match : forall a b H1 H2 Ha Hf x,
    biab Ha H1 H2 Hf ->
    biab (\[a=b] \* Ha) (x~~>a \* H1) (x~~>b \* H2) Hf

  | b_base_empty : forall Hf,
    biab \[] Hf \[] Hf.

Module BiabductionExamples.
(a=3) × x→a×y→b |- x->3 × (y→b) 
  
forall x y : loc,
exists (Ha Hf : hprop) (a : int),
  biab Ha (x ~~> vint a \* y ~~> vint 2)
    (x ~~> vint 3) Hf

  
forall x y : loc,
exists (Ha Hf : hprop) (a : int),
  biab Ha (x ~~> vint a \* y ~~> vint 2)
    (x ~~> vint 3) Hf

    
x, y: loc
exists (Ha Hf : hprop) (a : int),
  biab Ha (x ~~> vint a \* y ~~> vint 2)
    (x ~~> vint 3) Hf

    
x, y: loc
exists (Hf : hprop) (a : int),
  biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint a \* y ~~> vint 2)
    (x ~~> vint 3) Hf

    
x, y: loc
exists a : int,
  biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint a \* y ~~> vint 2)
    (x ~~> vint 3) ?Hf

    
x, y: loc
biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint ?a \* y ~~> vint 2)
  (x ~~> vint 3) ?Hf

    
x, y: loc
biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint 3 \* y ~~> vint 2)
  (x ~~> vint 3 \* \[]) ?Hf

    
x, y: loc
biab ?Ha (y ~~> vint 2) \[] ?Hf

    apply b_base_empty.
  Qed.

  (* we can see from the ex_intro constrs that the frame is y->2, and the abduced contraint is trivial but gives a value to a, which was immediately substituted *)
  (* Print ex1_biab. *)

End BiabductionExamples.


forall Ha H1 H2 Hf : hprop,
biab Ha H1 H2 Hf -> Ha \* H1 ==> H2 \* Hf


forall Ha H1 H2 Hf : hprop,
biab Ha H1 H2 Hf -> Ha \* H1 ==> H2 \* Hf

  
Ha, H1, H2, Hf: hprop
H: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
Ha \* H1 ==> H2 \* Hf

  
a, b: Val.val
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x: loc
H: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHbiab: Ha \* H1 ==> H2 \* Hf
(\[a = b] \* Ha) \* x ~~> a \* H1 ==>
(x ~~> b \* H2) \* Hf
Hf: hprop
\[] \* Hf ==> \[] \* Hf

  
a, b: Val.val
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x: loc
H: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHbiab: Ha \* H1 ==> H2 \* Hf
(\[a = b] \* Ha) \* x ~~> a \* H1 ==>
(x ~~> b \* H2) \* Hf
 xsimpl; auto. 
Hf: hprop
\[] \* Hf ==> \[] \* Hf

  
Hf: hprop
\[] \* Hf ==> \[] \* Hf
 xsimpl. }
Qed.
Biabduction for a single location. 
forall (x : loc) (a : Val.val) (env : env)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (H1 H2 : hprop)
  (f : flow),
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> a \* H2) f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)


forall (x : loc) (a : Val.val) (env : env)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (H1 H2 : hprop)
  (f : flow),
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> a \* H2) f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

  
x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
H: env0, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> a \* H2) f)
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

  
x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
H: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1) /\
  env0, h3, h2, r |= req (x ~~> a \* H2) f
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
 
x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h3: heap
r1: result
H3: env0, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1)
H4: env0, h3, h2, r |= req (x ~~> a \* H2) f
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

  (* ens adds a location to the heap *)
  
x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env0, h3, h2, r |= req (x ~~> a \* H2) f
H3: exists (v : val) (h4 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r1 = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* x ~~> a \* H1) h4 /\
  h3 = h1 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h4
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

  (* use that to figure out what is in h3 *)
  
x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env0, h3, h2, r |= req (x ~~> a \* H2) f
v: val
h0: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: r1 = norm v
H0: (\[v = vunit] \* x ~~> a \* H1) h0
H3: h3 = h1 \u h0
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
 
x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env0, h3, h2, r |= req (x ~~> a \* H2) f
v: val
h0: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: r1 = norm v
x0, x1: heap
H0: \[v = vunit] x0
H5: (x ~~> a \* H1) x1
H7: Fmap.disjoint x0 x1
H8: h0 = x0 \u x1
H3: h3 = h1 \u h0
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
 
x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env0, h3, h2, r |= req (x ~~> a \* H2) f
v: val
h0: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: r1 = norm v
x0, x1: heap
H0: v = vunit
H9: x0 = Fmap.empty
H5: (x ~~> a \* H1) x1
H7: Fmap.disjoint x0 x1
H8: h0 = x0 \u x1
H3: h3 = h1 \u h0
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
 
x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env0, h3, h2, r |= req (x ~~> a \* H2) f
v: val
h0: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: r1 = norm v
x0, x1: heap
H0: v = vunit
H9: x0 = Fmap.empty
x2, x3: heap
H5: (x ~~> a) x2
H10: H1 x3
H11: Fmap.disjoint x2 x3
H12: x1 = x2 \u x3
H7: Fmap.disjoint x0 x1
H8: h0 = x0 \u x1
H3: h3 = h1 \u h0
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
 
x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
r1: result
x2, x3: heap
H4: env0, h1 \u Fmap.empty \u x2 \u x3, h2, r
|= req (x ~~> a \* H2) f
v: val
H: r1 = norm v
H0: v = vunit
H5: (x ~~> a) x2
H10: H1 x3
H11: Fmap.disjoint x2 x3
H7: Fmap.disjoint Fmap.empty (x2 \u x3)
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 (Fmap.empty \u x2 \u x3)
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
 
x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
r1: result
x2, x3: heap
H4: env0, h1 \u x2 \u x3, h2, r
|= req (x ~~> a \* H2) f
v: val
H: r1 = norm v
H0: v = vunit
H5: (x ~~> a) x2
H10: H1 x3
H11: Fmap.disjoint x2 x3
H7: Fmap.disjoint Fmap.empty (x2 \u x3)
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 (x2 \u x3)
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

f: flow

|= req (x ~~> a) (req H2 f)

H: r1 = norm v
H0: v = vunit

H10: H1 x3
H11: Fmap.disjoint x2 x3

H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 (x2 \u x3)

H4: forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
(x ~~> a) hp ->
h1 \u x2 \u x3 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env0, hr, h2, r |= req H2 f
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

x: loc
a: Val.val
env0: env
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
r1: result
x2, x3: heap
v: val
H: r1 = norm v
H0: v = vunit

H10: H1 x3
H11: Fmap.disjoint x2 x3
H7: Fmap.disjoint Fmap.empty (x2 \u x3)

exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r1 = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h3 /\
  h1 \u x3 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

Qed.
The Float Pre rule (compaction 6) from the paper. 
forall (H1 : val -> hprop) (H2 Ha : hprop)
  (Hf : val -> hprop) (v : val) (f : flow),
biab Ha (H1 v) H2 (Hf v) ->
ens_ (H1 v);; req H2 f ⊑ req Ha (ens_ (Hf v);; f)


forall (H1 : val -> hprop) (H2 Ha : hprop)
  (Hf : val -> hprop) (v : val) (f : flow),
biab Ha (H1 v) H2 (Hf v) ->
ens_ (H1 v);; req H2 f ⊑ req Ha (ens_ (Hf v);; f)

  
forall (H1 : val -> hprop) (H2 Ha : hprop)
  (Hf : val -> hprop) (v : val) (f : flow),
biab Ha (H1 v) H2 (Hf v) ->
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ (H1 v);; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ (Hf v);; f)

  
H1: val -> hprop
H2, Ha: hprop
Hf: val -> hprop
v: val
f: flow
Hbi: biab Ha (H1 v) H2 (Hf v)
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ (H1 v);; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ (Hf v);; f)

  
H1, Hf: val -> hprop
v: val
f: flow
a, b: Val.val
H0, H2, Ha, Hf0: hprop
x: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H0 H2 Hf0
IHHbi: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H0;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H0);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req (\[a = b] \* Ha) (ens_ Hf0;; f)
H1, Hf: val -> hprop
v: val
f: flow
Hf0: hprop
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ Hf0;; req \[] f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req \[] (ens_ Hf0;; f)


  
H1, Hf: val -> hprop
v: val
f: flow
a, b: Val.val
H0, H2, Ha, Hf0: hprop
x: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H0 H2 Hf0
IHHbi: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H0;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)
forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H0);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req (\[a = b] \* Ha) (ens_ Hf0;; f)

env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H0;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)
env0: env

|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H0);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)

env0, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)

H: env0, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H0);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)
env0, h1, h2, r |= req (\[a = b] \* Ha) (ens_ Hf0;; f)


    
H1, Hf: val -> hprop
v: val
f: flow
a, b: Val.val
H0, H2, Ha, Hf0: hprop
x: loc

env0: env
IHHbi: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H0;; req H2 f) ->
env0, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H0);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)
env0, h1, h2, r
|= req \[a = b] (req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f))

    
H1, Hf: val -> hprop
v: val
f: flow
a, b: Val.val
H0, H2, Ha, Hf0: hprop
x: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H0 H2 Hf0
env0: env
IHHbi: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H0;; req H2 f) ->
env0, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H0);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)
forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
\[a = b] hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env0, hr, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)
 
H1, Hf: val -> hprop
v: val
f: flow
a, b: Val.val
H0, H2, Ha, Hf0: hprop
x: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H0 H2 Hf0
env0: env
IHHbi: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H0;; req H2 f) ->
env0, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H0);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H3: \[a = b] hp
H4: h1 = hr \u hp
H5: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)
 
H1, Hf: val -> hprop
v: val
f: flow
a, b: Val.val
H0, H2, Ha, Hf0: hprop
x: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H0 H2 Hf0
env0: env
IHHbi: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env0, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H0;; req H2 f) ->
env0, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env0, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H0);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H3: a = b
H6: hp = Fmap.empty
H4: h1 = hr \u hp
H5: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf0;; f)

Examples

Examples of everything defined so far, which is enough for entailments to be defined and proved. 
Module Examples.

  Definition f1 : flow := ens (fun r => \[r=vint 1]).
  Definition f2 : flow := fall (fun x => req_ (\[x = vint 1])).
  Definition f3 : flow := f1 ;; f2.

  
empty_env, Fmap.empty, Fmap.empty, norm (vint 1) |= f1

  
empty_env, Fmap.empty, Fmap.empty, norm (vint 1) |= f1

    
empty_env, Fmap.empty, Fmap.empty, norm (vint 1) |= f1

    
empty_env, Fmap.empty, Fmap.empty, norm (vint 1)
|= (ens r. \[r = vint 1])

    
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm (vint 1) = norm v /\
  \[v = vint 1] h3 /\
  Fmap.empty = Fmap.empty \u h3 /\
  Fmap.disjoint Fmap.empty h3

    
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  norm (vint 1) = norm ?v /\
  \[?v = vint 1] h3 /\
  Fmap.empty = Fmap.empty \u h3 /\
  Fmap.disjoint Fmap.empty h3
 
norm (vint 1) = norm ?v /\
\[?v = vint 1] ?h3 /\
Fmap.empty = Fmap.empty \u ?h3 /\
Fmap.disjoint Fmap.empty ?h3
 
\[vint 1 = vint 1] LibSepFmap.empty
Fmap.empty = Fmap.empty \u LibSepFmap.empty

    
\[] LibSepFmap.empty
vint 1 = vint 1
Fmap.empty = Fmap.empty \u LibSepFmap.empty

    
vint 1 = vint 1
Fmap.empty = Fmap.empty \u LibSepFmap.empty

    
Fmap.empty = Fmap.empty \u LibSepFmap.empty

    fmap_eq.
  Qed.

  
flow_res f1 (vint 1)

  
flow_res f1 (vint 1)

    
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v1 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1]) ->
v1 = vint 1

    
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1: val
H: env0, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1])
v1 = vint 1

    
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1: val
H: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm v1 = norm v /\
  \[v = vint 1] h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
v1 = vint 1
 
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1, v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: norm v1 = norm v
H: \[v = vint 1] h3
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
v1 = vint 1

    
h1: heap
env0: env
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: \[v = vint 1] h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
v = vint 1

    
h1: heap
env0: env
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
H0: \[] h3
vint 1 = vint 1

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
forall (v v1 : val) (f : flow) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (env : env),
env, h1, h2, norm v |= f -> flow_res f v1 -> v = v1

  
forall (v v1 : val) (f : flow) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (env : env),
env, h1, h2, norm v |= f -> flow_res f v1 -> v = v1

    
forall (v v1 : val) (f : flow) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (env0 : env),
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f ->
(forall (h3 h4 : heap) (env : env) (v2 : val),
 env, h3, h4, norm v2 |= f -> v2 = v1) -> v = v1

    
v, v1: val
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
H: env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v2 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v2 |= f -> v2 = v1
v = v1

    
v, v1: val
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
H: env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f
H0: v = v1
v = v1

    assumption.
  Qed.

  
forall v : val, flow_res f1 v -> v = vint 1

  
forall v : val, flow_res f1 v -> v = vint 1

    
forall v : val,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v1 : val),
 env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1]) ->
 v1 = v) -> v = vint 1

    
v: val
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v1 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1]) ->
v1 = v
v = vint 1

H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v1 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1]) ->
v1 = v

|= (ens r. \[r = vint 1])

env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1]) ->
v1 = v
H0: vint 1 = v
v = vint 1

    
v: val
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v1 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1]) ->
v1 = v
empty_env, empty_heap, empty_heap, norm (vint 1)
|= (ens r. \[r = vint 1])
 
v: val

env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1]) ->
v1 = v
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm (vint 1) = norm v /\
  \[v = vint 1] h3 /\
  empty_heap = empty_heap \u h3 /\
  Fmap.disjoint empty_heap h3

      
v: val
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v1 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1]) ->
v1 = v
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  norm (vint 1) = norm (vint 1) /\
  \[vint 1 = vint 1] h3 /\
  empty_heap = empty_heap \u h3 /\
  Fmap.disjoint empty_heap h3
 
v: val
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v1 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1]) ->
v1 = v
norm (vint 1) = norm (vint 1) /\
\[vint 1 = vint 1] empty_heap /\
empty_heap = empty_heap \u empty_heap /\
Fmap.disjoint empty_heap empty_heap

v1 = v

      fmap_eq. 
v: val
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v1 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens r. \[r = vint 1]) ->
v1 = v
H0: vint 1 = v
v = vint 1

      congruence.
  Qed.

  
flow_res f2 vunit

  
flow_res f2 vunit

    
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v1 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v1
|= (∀ x : val, req_ \[x = vint 1]) -> v1 = vunit

    
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1: val
H: env0, h1, h2, norm v1
|= (∀ x : val, req_ \[x = vint 1])
v1 = vunit

    
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1: val
H: forall v : val,
env0, h1, h2, norm v1 |= req_ \[v = vint 1]
v1 = vunit

    
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1: val
H: env0, h1, h2, norm v1 |= req_ \[vint 1 = vint 1]
v1 = vunit

env0: env
v1: val
H: norm v1 = norm vunit
v1 = vunit
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1: val
H: env0, h1, h2, norm v1 |= req_ \[vint 1 = vint 1]
vint 1 = vint 1

    
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1: val
H: env0, h1, h2, norm v1 |= req_ \[vint 1 = vint 1]
vint 1 = vint 1

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  Definition f4 : flow := empty;; fall (fun r => unk "f" (vint 1) r).
  Definition f4_env : env :=
    Fmap.update empty_env "f" (Some (fun _ r => ens_ \[r = vint 2])).

  (* has to be 2 *)
  
flow_res_in_env f4 (vint 2) f4_env

  
flow_res_in_env f4 (vint 2) f4_env

    
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v1 : val),
f4_env, h1, h2, norm v1
|= (empty;; ∀ r : val, ("f"$(vint 1, r))) ->
v1 = vint 2

    
h1, h2: heap
v1: val
H: f4_env, h1, h2, norm v1
|= (empty;; ∀ r : val, ("f"$(vint 1, r)))
v1 = vint 2

    
h1, h2: heap
v1: val
H: f4_env, h1, h2, norm v1
|= (∀ r : val, ("f"$(vint 1, r)))
v1 = vint 2

    
h1, h2: heap
v1: val
H: forall v : val,
f4_env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= ("f"$(vint 1, v))
v1 = vint 2
 
h1, h2: heap
v1: val
H: f4_env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= ("f"$(vint 1, v1))
v1 = vint 2

    
h1, h2: heap
v1: val
H: f4_env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= ?Goal0 (vint 1) v1
v1 = vint 2
h1, h2: heap
v1: val
H: f4_env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= ("f"$(vint 1, v1))
Fmap.read f4_env "f" = Some ?Goal0

req (H \* H1) f ⊑ req H (req H1 f)

forall x y : int,
req \[x > 0] (ens_ \[y = 1])
⊑ req \[x = 1] (ens_ \[y > 0])

  
forall x y : int,
req \[x > 0] (ens_ \[y = 1])
⊑ req \[x = 1] (ens_ \[y > 0])

Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env0, hr, h2, r |= ens_ \[y > 0]

  (\[v = vunit] \* \[y = 1]) h3 /\
  h2 = hr \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint hr h3

  Definition e6_env : env :=
    Fmap.single "f" (Some (fun y r =>
    match y with
    | vloc x => req (x~~>vint 1) (ens_ (x~~>vint 2))
    | _ => empty
    end)).

  
forall x : Staged.loc,
e6_env
⊢ ("f"$(vloc x, vunit));;
  ∀ a : int, req (x ~~> vint a) (ens_ (x ~~> vint a))
⊑ req (x ~~> vint 1) (ens_ (x ~~> vint 2))

  
forall x : Staged.loc,
e6_env
⊢ ("f"$(vloc x, vunit));;
  ∀ a : int, req (x ~~> vint a) (ens_ (x ~~> vint a))
⊑ req (x ~~> vint 1) (ens_ (x ~~> vint 2))

    (* Set Mangle Names. *)

    
forall (x : Staged.loc) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
e6_env, h1, h2, r
|= (("f"$(vloc x, vunit));;
    ∀ a : int,
      req (x ~~> vint a) (ens_ (x ~~> vint a))) ->
e6_env, h1, h2, r
|= req (x ~~> vint 1) (ens_ (x ~~> vint 2))

    
x: Staged.loc
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: e6_env, h1, h2, r
|= (("f"$(vloc x, vunit));;
    ∀ a : int,
      req (x ~~> vint a) (ens_ (x ~~> vint a)))
e6_env, h1, h2, r
|= req (x ~~> vint 1) (ens_ (x ~~> vint 2))


    (* first reason backward to access the req *)
    
x: Staged.loc
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: e6_env, h1, h2, r
|= (("f"$(vloc x, vunit));;
    ∀ a : int,
      req (x ~~> vint a) (ens_ (x ~~> vint a)))
forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
(x ~~> vint 1) hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
e6_env, hr, h2, r |= ens_ (x ~~> vint 2)

h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: e6_env, h1, h2, r
|= (("f"$(vloc x, vunit));;
    ∀ a : int,
      req (x ~~> vint a) (ens_ (x ~~> vint a)))
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H0: (x ~~> vint 1) hp
H1: h1 = hr \u hp
H2: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
e6_env, hr, h2, r |= ens_ (x ~~> vint 2)

    (* the function is unknown, so use its definition,

H: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  e6_env, hr, h3, r1 |= ens_ (x ~~> vint 2) /\
  e6_env, h3, h2, r
  |= (∀ a : int,
