x: Staged.loc
h1, h2: heap
r: result
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
h3: heap
r1: result
h0: heap
r2: result
He: e6_env, hr, h0, r2 |= ens_ (x ~~> vint 2)
Hr: e6_env, h0, h2, r
|= (∀ a : int,
      req (x ~~> vint a) (ens_ (x ~~> vint a)))
e6_env, hr, h2, r |= ens_ (x ~~> vint 2)


      (* assume the ens *)
      
x: Staged.loc
h1, h2: heap
r: result
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
h3: heap
r1: result
h0: heap
r2: result
Hr: e6_env, h0, h2, r
|= (∀ a : int,
      req (x ~~> vint a) (ens_ (x ~~> vint a)))
He: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  r2 = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* x ~~> vint 2) h3 /\
  h0 = hr \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint hr h3
e6_env, hr, h2, r |= ens_ (x ~~> vint 2)
 
x: Staged.loc
h1, h2: heap
r: result
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
h3: heap
r1: result
h0: heap
r2: result
Hr: e6_env, h0, h2, r
|= (∀ a : int,
      req (x ~~> vint a) (ens_ (x ~~> vint a)))
x0: val
h4: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: r2 = norm x0
H3: (\[x0 = vunit] \* x ~~> vint 2) h4
H4: h0 = hr \u h4
H0: Fmap.disjoint hr h4
e6_env, hr, h2, r |= ens_ (x ~~> vint 2)

x: Staged.loc
h1, h2: heap
r: result
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val

e6_env, hr, h2, r |= ens_ (x ~~> vint 2)

    assumption.
  Qed.

  (* lfp interpretation *)
  (*
    forall n res, sum(n, res) =
         n=0/\res=0
      \/ ex n1. ens n=n1/\n1>0; ex r1. sum(n-1,r1); ens res=1+r1
  *)
  Definition sum n res :=
    disj
      (ens_ \[exists n1, n = vint n1 /\ n1 <= 0 /\ res = vint 0])
      (fex (fun n1 => ens_ \[n = vint n1 /\ n1 > 0];; fex (fun r1 =>
        (unk "sum" (vint (n1-1)) (vint r1);;
          ens_ \[res = vint (1 + r1)])))).

  Definition sum_env := (Fmap.update empty_env "sum" (Some sum)).
  Definition sum_property (n res:val) := ens_ \[res = n].

  (* Close Scope flow_scope. *)

  
forall (n1 : int) (n res : val),
n1 >= 0 ->
n = vint n1 ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ sum_property n res

  
forall (n1 : int) (n res : val),
n1 >= 0 ->
n = vint n1 ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ sum_property n res

    
forall (n1 : int) (n res : val),
n1 >= 0 ->
n = vint n1 -> sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]

    (* do induction on the numeric value of n *)
    
n: int
forall n0 res : val,
n >= 0 ->
n0 = vint n -> sum_env ⊢ sum n0 res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n0]

    
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
forall n0 res : val,
n >= 0 ->
n0 = vint n -> sum_env ⊢ sum n0 res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n0]

    
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
forall n0 res : val,
n >= 0 ->
n0 = vint n ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
sum_env, h1, h2, r
|= disj
     (ens_
        \[exists n1 : int,
            n0 = vint n1 /\ n1 <= 0 /\ res = vint 0])
     (∃ n1 : int,
        (ens_ \[n0 = vint n1 /\ n1 > 0];;
         ∃ r1 : int,
           (("sum"$(vint (n1 - 1), vint r1));;
            ens_ \[res = vint (1 + r1)]))) ->
sum_env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[res = n0]

    
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
n0, res: val
H: n >= 0
H0: n0 = vint n
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: sum_env, h1, h2, r
|= disj
     (ens_
        \[exists n1 : int,
            n0 = vint n1 /\
            n1 <= 0 /\ res = vint 0])
     (∃ n1 : int,
        (ens_ \[n0 = vint n1 /\ n1 > 0];;
         ∃ r1 : int,
           (("sum"$(vint (n1 - 1), vint r1));;
            ens_ \[res = vint (1 + r1)])))
sum_env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[res = n0]

    
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
n0, res: val
H: n >= 0
H0: n0 = vint n
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: sum_env, h1, h2, r
|= ens_
     \[exists n1 : int,
         n0 = vint n1 /\ n1 <= 0 /\ res = vint 0]
sum_env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[res = n0]
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
n0, res: val
H: n >= 0
H0: n0 = vint n
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: sum_env, h1, h2, r
|= (∃ n1 : int,
      (ens_ \[n0 = vint n1 /\ n1 > 0];;
       ∃ r1 : int,
         (("sum"$(vint (n1 - 1), vint r1));;
          ens_ \[res = vint (1 + r1)])))
sum_env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[res = n0]

    (* base case *)
    
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
n0, res: val
H: n >= 0
H0: n0 = vint n
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: sum_env, h1, h2, r
|= ens_
     \[exists n1 : int,
         n0 = vint n1 /\ n1 <= 0 /\ res = vint 0]
sum_env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[res = n0]
 
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
n0, res: val
H: n >= 0
H0: n0 = vint n
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: (exists n1 : int,
   n0 = vint n1 /\ n1 <= 0 /\ res = vint 0) /\
h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit
sum_env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[res = n0]
 
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
n0, res: val
H: n >= 0
H0: n0 = vint n
h1, h2: heap
r: result
n1: int
H2: n0 = vint n1
H1: n1 <= 0
H5: res = vint 0
H4: h1 = h2
H6: r = norm vunit
sum_env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[res = n0]
 
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
H: n >= 0
h2: heap
n1: int
H2: vint n = vint n1
H1: n1 <= 0
sum_env, h2, h2, norm vunit |= ens_ \[vint 0 = vint n]
 
n1: int
H: n1 >= 0
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n1 ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
h2: heap
H1: n1 <= 0
sum_env, h2, h2, norm vunit
|= ens_ \[vint 0 = vint n1]

n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
n0, res: val
H: n >= 0
H0: n0 = vint n
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: sum_env, h1, h2, r
|= (∃ n1 : int,
      (ens_ \[n0 = vint n1 /\ n1 > 0];;
       ∃ r1 : int,
         (("sum"$(vint (n1 - 1), vint r1));;
          ens_ \[res = vint (1 + r1)])))
sum_env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[res = n0]

    (* recursive case *)
    
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall n res : val,
y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
n0, res: val
H: n >= 0
H0: n0 = vint n
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: sum_env, h1, h2, r
|= (∃ n1 : int,
      (ens_ \[n0 = vint n1 /\ n1 > 0];;
       ∃ r1 : int,
         (("sum"$(vint (n1 - 1), vint r1));;
          ens_ \[res = vint (1 + r1)])))
sum_env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[res = n0]
 
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->

y >= 0 ->
n = vint y ->
sum_env ⊢ sum n res ⊑ ens_ \[res = n]
n0, res: val

H0: n0 = vint n
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: exists v : int,
  sum_env, h1, h2, r
  |= (ens_ \[n0 = vint v /\ v > 0];;
      ∃ r1 : int,

         ens_ \[res = vint (1 + r1)]))
sum_env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[res = n0]

h2: heap
H2: vint n = vint n1
H3: n1 > 0
H1: vint r1 = vint (n1 - 1)

|= ens_ \[vint (1 + r1) = vint n]

h2: heap

H3: n1 > 0

h2: heap

n1: int
H: n1 >= 0
h2: heap

vint (1 + (n1 - 1)) = vint n1
 
n1: int
H: n1 >= 0
h2: heap
H3: n1 > 0
1 + (n1 - 1) = n1
 math. }
  Qed.

  Definition foldr : ufun := fun args rr =>
    match args with
    | vtup (vstr f) (vtup (vint a) (vlist l)) =>
      disj
        (ens_ \[rr = vint a /\ l = nil])
        (fex (fun x => fex (fun r => fex (fun l1 =>
          ens_ \[l = cons x l1];;
          unk "foldr" (vtup (vstr f) (vtup (vint a) (vlist l1))) r;;
          unk f (vtup x r) rr))))
    | _ => empty
    end.

  Definition foldr_env := (Fmap.update empty_env "foldr" (Some foldr)).

End Examples.

Big-step semantics

Inductive eresult : Type :=
  | enorm : val -> eresult.
Program environment 
Definition penv := fmap ident (option (val -> expr)).
Definition empty_prenv : env := Fmap.empty.

Inductive bigstep : penv -> heap -> expr -> heap -> eresult -> Prop :=
  | eval_pval : forall h v env,
    bigstep env h (pval v) h (enorm v)

  (* there is no var rule *)

  | eval_plet : forall h1 h3 h2 x e1 e2 v r env,
    bigstep env h1 e1 h3 (enorm v) ->
    bigstep env h3 (subst x v e2) h2 r ->
    bigstep env h1 (plet x e1 e2) h2 r

  | eval_padd : forall h x y env,
    bigstep env h (padd (vint x) (vint y)) h (enorm (vint (x + y)))

  | eval_pminus : forall h x y env,
    bigstep env h (pminus (vint x) (vint y)) h (enorm (vint (x - y)))

  | eval_pfun : forall h x e env,
    bigstep env h (pfun x e) h (enorm (vfun x e))

  | eval_pfix : forall h x e f env,
    bigstep env h (pfix f x e) h (enorm (vfix f x e))

  | eval_app_fun : forall v1 v2 h x e r env,
    v1 = vfun x e ->
    bigstep env h (subst x v2 e) h r ->
    bigstep env h (papp (pval v1) v2) h r

  | eval_app_fix : forall v1 v2 h x e r fn env,
    v1 = vfix fn x e ->
    bigstep env h (subst x v2 (subst fn v1 e)) h r ->
    bigstep env h (papp (pval v1) v2) h r

  | eval_app_unk : forall va h r f fn env,
    Fmap.read env fn = Some f ->
    bigstep env h (f va) h r ->
    bigstep env h (papp (pvar fn) va) h r

  | eval_pif_true : forall h1 h2 r e1 e2 env,
    bigstep env h1 e1 h2 r ->
    bigstep env h1 (pif (vbool true) e1 e2) h2 r

  | eval_pif_false : forall h1 h2 r e1 e2 env,
    bigstep env h1 e2 h2 r ->
    bigstep env h1 (pif (vbool false) e1 e2) h2 r

  | eval_pref : forall h v p env,
    ~ Fmap.indom h p ->
    bigstep env h (pref v) (Fmap.update h p v) (enorm (vloc p))

  | eval_pderef : forall h p env,
    Fmap.indom h p ->
    bigstep env h (pderef (vloc p)) h (enorm (Fmap.read h p))

  | eval_passign : forall h p v env,
    Fmap.indom h p ->
    bigstep env h (passign (vloc p) v) (Fmap.update h p v) (enorm vunit)

  | eval_passert : forall h env,
    bigstep env h (passert (vbool true)) h (enorm vunit).

(* Definition compatible r1 r2 :=
  match (r1, r2) with
  | (norm r3, enorm r4) => r3 = r4
end. *)

Program logic rules

Inductive forward : expr -> flow -> Prop :=
  | fw_val: forall n,
    forward (pval n) (ens (fun res => \[res = n]))

  (* there is no need for fw_var/a store because substitution will take care of it before it is reached *)

  | fw_let: forall x e1 e2 f1 f2 v,
    forward e1 f1 ->
    flow_res f1 v ->
    forward (subst x v e2) f2 ->
    forward (plet x e1 e2) (f1 ;; f2)

  | fw_if: forall b e1 e2 f1 f2,
    forward e1 f1 ->
    forward e2 f2 ->
    forward (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

  | fw_deref: forall x,
    forward (pderef (vloc x))
      (fall (fun y => (req (x~~>y)
        (ens (fun res => \[res = y] \* x~~>y)))))

  | fw_ref: forall v,
    forward (pref v) (fex (fun y =>
      (ens (fun r => \[r = vloc y] \* y~~>v))))

  | fw_assign: forall x y v,
    forward (passign (vloc x) y)
      (req (x~~>v) (ens_ (x~~>y)))

  | fw_assert: forall b,
    forward (passert (vbool b)) (req_ \[b = true])

  | fw_app_fun: forall vf x e va f,
    vf = vfun x e ->
    forward (subst x va e) f ->
    forward (papp (pval vf) va) f

  | fw_app_fix: forall vf x e va f fn,
    vf = vfix fn x e ->
    forward (subst x va (subst fn vf e)) f ->
    forward (papp (pval vf) va) f

  | fw_app_unk: forall f va,
    forward (papp (pvar f) va) (fex (fun r => unk f va r)).


Module Soundness.

Semantic tuples
A semantic tuple is our equivalent of a Hoare triple: a valid one ensures ensures that the given program satisfies the given specification.
The use of "tuple" alludes to the fact that we may constrain the program with an arbitrary number of pre- and postconditions. 
  Definition tuple_valid_under penv env e f : Prop :=
    forall h1 h2 v,
      bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) -> satisfies env h1 h2 (norm v) f.
Roughly, this says that for every binding in the program environment, we can find a "corresponding" one in the spec environment, where "corresponding" means related by a valid semantic tuple. 
  Definition env_compatible penv env :=
    forall pfn f x,
      Fmap.read penv f = Some pfn ->
      exists sfn, Fmap.read env f = Some sfn /\
      forall v, tuple_valid_under penv env (pfn x) (sfn x v).
The full definition requires compatible environments. 
  Definition sem_tuple (e: expr) (f: flow) : Prop :=
    forall penv env,
      env_compatible penv env -> tuple_valid_under penv env e f.

  
Proper (respectful eq (respectful entails impl))
  sem_tuple

  
Proper (respectful eq (respectful entails impl))
  sem_tuple

    
forall x y : expr,
x = y ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0) ->
(forall
   (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
   (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
 env_compatible penv env ->
 forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
 bigstep penv h1 x h2 (enorm v) ->
 env, h1, h2, norm v |= x0) ->
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
bigstep penv h1 y h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h1, h2, norm v |= y0

    
x, y: expr
H: x = y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0
H1: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
bigstep penv h1 x h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h1, h2, norm v |= x0
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
H2: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
H3: bigstep penv0 h1 y h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= y0
 
y: expr
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0
H1: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
bigstep penv h1 y h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h1, h2, norm v |= x0
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
H2: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
H3: bigstep penv0 h1 y h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= y0

    eauto.
  Qed.
Structural rules 
  
forall (f1 f2 : flow) (e : expr),
f2 ⊑ f1 -> sem_tuple e f2 -> sem_tuple e f1

  
forall (f1 f2 : flow) (e : expr),
f2 ⊑ f1 -> sem_tuple e f2 -> sem_tuple e f1

    
f1, f2: flow
e: expr
He: f2 ⊑ f1
H: sem_tuple e f2
sem_tuple e f1

    
f1, f2: flow
e: expr
He: f2 ⊑ f1
H: sem_tuple e f2
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env e f1
 
f1, f2: flow
e: expr
He: f2 ⊑ f1
H: sem_tuple e f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
H0: env_compatible penv0 env0
tuple_valid_under penv0 env0 e f1

    
f1, f2: flow
e: expr
He: f2 ⊑ f1
H: sem_tuple e f1
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
H0: env_compatible penv0 env0
tuple_valid_under penv0 env0 e f1

    eauto.
  Qed.
Rules for program constructs 
  
forall n : val,
sem_tuple (pval n) (ens res. \[res = n])

  
forall n : val,
sem_tuple (pval n) (ens res. \[res = n])

    
forall (n : val)
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (pval n)
  (ens res. \[res = n])
 
n: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])

    (* appeal to how e executes to tell us about the heaps *)
    
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
v: val
env0, h2, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = v])

    (* justify that the staged formula describes the heap *)
    
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
v: val
v = v

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
forall (x : ident) (e1 e2 : expr) (f1 f2 : flow)
  (v : val),
sem_tuple e1 f1 ->
flow_res f1 v ->
sem_tuple (subst x v e2) f2 ->
sem_tuple (plet x e1 e2) (f1;; f2)

  
forall (x : ident) (e1 e2 : expr) (f1 f2 : flow)
  (v : val),
sem_tuple e1 f1 ->
flow_res f1 v ->
sem_tuple (subst x v e2) f2 ->
sem_tuple (plet x e1 e2) (f1;; f2)

forall (b : val) (e1 e2 : expr) (f1 f2 : flow),
sem_tuple e1 f1 ->
sem_tuple e2 f2 ->
sem_tuple (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

sem_tuple e1 f1 ->
sem_tuple e2 f2 ->
sem_tuple (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2

env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e1 h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e2 h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

    
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e1 h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

      
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env e1 f1
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e1 h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

      
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e1 h2 (enorm v)
Ht: env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f1
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

      now apply s_disj_l. 
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e2 h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

    
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e2 h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

      
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1
Hf: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env e2 f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e2 h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

      
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e2 h2 (enorm v)
Hf: env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f2
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

      now apply s_disj_r. }
  Qed.

  
forall x : Staged.loc,
sem_tuple (pderef (vloc x))
  (∀ y : Val.val,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

  
forall x : Staged.loc,
sem_tuple (pderef (vloc x))
  (∀ y : Val.val,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

    
x: Staged.loc
sem_tuple (pderef (vloc x))
  (∀ y : Val.val,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))
 
x: Staged.loc
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (pderef (vloc x))
  (∀ y : Val.val,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))
 
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pderef (vloc x)) h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v
|= (∀ y : Val.val,
      req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

    
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
env0, h2, h2, norm (Fmap.read h2 x)
|= (∀ y : Val.val,
      req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

    
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
forall v : Val.val,
env0, h2, h2, norm (Fmap.read h2 x)
|= req (x ~~> v) (ens res. \[res = v] \* x ~~> v)
 
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
env0, h2, h2, norm (Fmap.read h2 x)
|= req (x ~~> v) (ens res. \[res = v] \* x ~~> v)

    
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
(x ~~> v) hp ->
h2 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env0, hr, h2, norm (Fmap.read h2 x)
|= (ens res. \[res = v] \* x ~~> v)
 
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, h2, norm (Fmap.read h2 x)
|= (ens res. \[res = v] \* x ~~> v)

    
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
exists (v0 : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm (Fmap.read h2 x) = norm v0 /\
  (\[v0 = v] \* x ~~> v) h3 /\
  h2 = hr \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint hr h3
 
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  norm (Fmap.read h2 x) = norm v /\
  (\[v = v] \* x ~~> v) h3 /\
  h2 = hr \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint hr h3

h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
norm (Fmap.read h2 x) = norm v /\
(\[v = v] \* x ~~> v) hp /\
h2 = hr \u hp /\ Fmap.disjoint hr hp

x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
Fmap.read h2 x = v

      
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: hp = Fmap.single x v
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
Fmap.read h2 x = v

      
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: hp = Fmap.single x v
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr (Fmap.single x v)
Fmap.read h2 x = v

      
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
v: Val.val
hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
Hb: Fmap.indom (hr \u Fmap.single x v) x
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr (Fmap.single x v)
Fmap.read (hr \u Fmap.single x v) x = v

      
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)

v: Val.val
hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
Hb: Fmap.indom (hr \u Fmap.single x v) x
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr (Fmap.single x v)
Fmap.read (Fmap.single x v \u hr) x = v

v: Val.val

Hb: Fmap.indom (hr \u Fmap.single x v) x
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr (Fmap.single x v)
Fmap.read (Fmap.single x v) x = v
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
v: Val.val
hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
Hb: Fmap.indom (hr \u Fmap.single x v) x
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr (Fmap.single x v)
Fmap.indom (Fmap.single x v) x

      
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
v: Val.val
hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
Hb: Fmap.indom (hr \u Fmap.single x v) x
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr (Fmap.single x v)
Fmap.indom (Fmap.single x v) x

      apply Fmap.indom_single. 
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
(\[v = v] \* x ~~> v) hp

    
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
(\[v = v] \* x ~~> v) hp
 
x: Staged.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.val
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
v = v /\ (x ~~> v) hp

      intuition. }
  Qed.

  
forall v : val,
sem_tuple (pref v)
  (∃ y : Staged.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

  
forall v : val,
sem_tuple (pref v)
  (∃ y : Staged.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

    
v: val
sem_tuple (pref v)
  (∃ y : Staged.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

    
v: val
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (pref v)
  (∃ y : Staged.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v0: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pref v) h2 (enorm v0)
env0, h1, h2, norm v0
|= (∃ y : Staged.loc,
      (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
env0, h1, Fmap.update h1 p v, norm (vloc p)
|= (∃ y : Staged.loc,
      (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
exists v0 : Staged.loc,
  env0, h1, Fmap.update h1 p v, norm (vloc p)
  |= (ens r. \[r = vloc v0] \* v0 ~~> v)
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
env0, h1, Fmap.update h1 p v, norm (vloc p)
|= (ens r. \[r = vloc p] \* p ~~> v)

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
exists (v0 : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm (vloc p) = norm v0 /\
  (\[v0 = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) h3 /\
  Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  norm (vloc p) = norm (vloc p) /\
  (\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) h3 /\
  Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
norm (vloc p) = norm (vloc p) /\
(\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v) /\
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v /\
Fmap.disjoint h1 (Fmap.single p v)

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
~ Fmap.indom h1 p
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
norm (vloc p) = norm (vloc p) /\
(\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v) /\
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v /\
Fmap.disjoint h1 (Fmap.single p v)

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
~ Fmap.indom h1 p
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
 exact Hb. 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
norm (vloc p) = norm (vloc p) /\
(\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v) /\
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v /\
Fmap.disjoint h1 (Fmap.single p v)


    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
(\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
(\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
vloc p = vloc p /\ (p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)

      
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
(p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)

      apply hsingle_intro. 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
Fmap.update h1 p v = Fmap.single p v \u h1

      apply Fmap.update_eq_union_single. }
  Qed.

  
forall (x : Staged.loc) (y : val) (v : Val.val),
sem_tuple (passign (vloc x) y)
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

  
forall (x : Staged.loc) (y : val) (v : Val.val),
sem_tuple (passign (vloc x) y)
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

    
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
sem_tuple (passign (vloc x) y)
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

    
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (passign (vloc x) y)
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))
 
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v0: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (passign (vloc x) y) h2
  (enorm v0)
env0, h1, h2, norm v0
|= req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y))

    
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
env0, h1, Fmap.update h1 x y, norm vunit
|= req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y))

    
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
(x ~~> v) hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env0, hr, Fmap.update h1 x y, norm vunit
|= ens_ (x ~~> y)
 
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h1 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, Fmap.update h1 x y, norm vunit
|= ens_ (x ~~> y)

    
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h1 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val),
  norm vunit = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* x ~~> y) h3 /\
  Fmap.update h1 x y = hr \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint hr h3
 
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h1 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
  norm vunit = norm vunit /\
  (\[vunit = vunit] \* x ~~> y) h3 /\
  Fmap.update h1 x y = hr \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint hr h3
 
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h1 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
norm vunit = norm vunit /\
(\[vunit = vunit] \* x ~~> y) (Fmap.update hp x y) /\
Fmap.update h1 x y = hr \u Fmap.update hp x y /\
Fmap.disjoint hr (Fmap.update hp x y)


    (* the heap reasoning is most of this *)

forall b : bool,
sem_tuple (passert (vbool b)) (req_ \[b = true])

  
forall b : bool,
sem_tuple (passert (vbool b)) (req_ \[b = true])

    
b: bool
sem_tuple (passert (vbool b)) (req_ \[b = true])

    
b: bool
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (passert (vbool b))
  (req_ \[b = true])
 
b: bool
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (passert (vbool b)) h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= req_ \[b = true]

    
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
env0, h2, h2, norm vunit |= req_ \[true = true]

    
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
forall hp hr : Fmap.fmap loc Val.val,
\[true = true] hp ->
h2 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env0, hr, h2, norm vunit |= empty

    
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: \[true = true] hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, h2, norm vunit |= empty

    
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: true = true /\ hp = Fmap.empty
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, h2, norm vunit |= empty
 
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: true = true
H2: hp = Fmap.empty
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, h2, norm vunit |= empty
 
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: true = true
H2: hp = Fmap.empty
H0: h2 = hr \u Fmap.empty
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, h2, norm vunit |= empty
 
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: true = true
H2: hp = Fmap.empty
H0: h2 = hr
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, h2, norm vunit |= empty
 
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
hp, hr: Fmap.fmap loc Val.val
H: true = true
H2: hp = Fmap.empty
H0: h2 = hr
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env0, hr, hr, norm vunit |= empty

    apply empty_intro.
  Qed.

  
forall (vf : val) (x : ident) (e : expr) (va : val)
  (f : flow),
vf = vfun x e ->
sem_tuple (subst x va e) f ->
sem_tuple (papp (pval vf) va) f

  
forall (vf : val) (x : ident) (e : expr) (va : val)
  (f : flow),
vf = vfun x e ->
sem_tuple (subst x va e) f ->
sem_tuple (papp (pval vf) va) f

    
vf: val
x: ident
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H: vf = vfun x e
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
sem_tuple (papp (pval vf) va) f
 
x: ident
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
sem_tuple (papp (pval (vfun x e)) va) f

    
x: ident
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (papp (pval (vfun x e)) va)
  f
 
x: ident
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (papp (pval (vfun x e)) va) h2
  (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= f

    
x: ident
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
v: val
forall (x0 : ident) (e0 : expr),
vfun x e = vfun x0 e0 ->
bigstep penv0 h2 (subst x0 va e0) h2 (enorm v) ->
env0, h2, h2, norm v |= f

  (subst x0 va (subst fn (vfun x e) e0)) h2

forall (f : ident) (va : val),
sem_tuple (papp (pvar f) va) (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

sem_tuple (papp (pvar f) va) (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

va: val

va: val

  (env : Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->

  (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))
 
f: ident
va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (papp (pvar f) va) h2 (enorm v)
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

    
f: ident
va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap
v: val
forall f0 : val -> expr,
Fmap.read penv0 f = Some f0 ->
bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v) ->
env0, h2, h2, norm v |= (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h2: heap

Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)
env0, h2, h2, norm v |= (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

va: val

h2: heap

exists v0 : val, env0, h2, h2, norm v |= (f$(va, v0))

f: ident
va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
Hc: forall (pfn : val -> expr) (f : ident) (x : val),
Fmap.read penv0 f = Some pfn ->
exists sfn : ufun,
  Fmap.read env0 f = Some sfn /\
  (forall v : val,
   tuple_valid_under penv0 env0 (pfn x) (sfn x v))
h2: heap
v: val
f0: val -> expr
Henv: Fmap.read penv0 f = Some f0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)
env0, h2, h2, norm v |= (f$(va, v))

va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h2: heap
v: val
f0: val -> expr
Henv: Fmap.read penv0 f = Some f0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)
Hc: exists sfn : ufun,
  Fmap.read env0 f = Some sfn /\
  (forall v : val,
   tuple_valid_under penv0 env0 
     (f0 va) (sfn va v))
env0, h2, h2, norm v |= (f$(va, v))

va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h2: heap
v: val
f0: val -> expr

Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)
sfn: ufun
H0: Fmap.read env0 f = Some sfn
H1: forall v : val,
tuple_valid_under penv0 env0 (f0 va) (sfn va v)
env0, h2, h2, norm v |= (f$(va, v))

va: val

tuple_valid_under penv0 env0 (f0 va) (sfn va v)
Fmap.read env0 f = Some ?f

tuple_valid_under penv0 env0 (f0 va) (sfn va v)

va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h2: heap
v: val
f0: val -> expr

Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)

tuple_valid_under penv0 env0 (f0 va) (sfn va v)
Fmap.read env0 f = Some ?f
 exact H0. 
f: ident
va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h2: heap
v: val
f0: val -> expr
Henv: Fmap.read penv0 f = Some f0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)

tuple_valid_under penv0 env0 (f0 va) (sfn va v)

f: ident
va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: Fmap.fmap ident (option ufun)
h2: heap
v: val
f0: val -> expr
Henv: Fmap.read penv0 f = Some f0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)
sfn: ufun
H0: Fmap.read env0 f = Some sfn
H1: env0, h2, h2, norm v |= sfn va ?TEMP0
env0, h2, h2, norm v |= sfn va v

    exact H1.
  Qed.

  Local Notation derivable := forward.
  Local Notation valid := sem_tuple.

Soundness

  
forall (e : expr) (f : flow),
derivable e f -> valid e f

  
forall (e : expr) (f : flow),
derivable e f -> valid e f

    
e: expr
f: flow
H: derivable e f
valid e f

    
n: val
valid (pval n) (ens res. \[res = n])
x: ident
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
v: val
H: derivable e1 f1
H0: flow_res f1 v
H1: derivable (subst x v e2) f2
IHforward1: valid e1 f1
IHforward2: valid (subst x v e2) f2
valid (plet x e1 e2) (f1;; f2)
b: val
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
H: derivable e1 f1
H0: derivable e2 f2
IHforward1: valid e1 f1
IHforward2: valid e2 f2
valid (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)
x: Staged.loc
valid (pderef (vloc x))
  (∀ y : Val.val,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))
v: val
valid (pref v)
  (∃ y : Staged.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
valid (passign (vloc x) y)
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))
b: bool
valid (passert (vbool b)) (req_ \[b = true])
vf: val
x: ident
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H: vf = vfun x e
H0: derivable (subst x va e) f
IHforward: valid (subst x va e) f
valid (papp (pval vf) va) f
vf: val
x: ident
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
fn: ident
H: vf = vfix fn x e
H0: derivable (subst x va (subst fn vf e)) f
IHforward: valid (subst x va (subst fn vf e)) f
valid (papp (pval vf) va) f
f: ident
va: val
valid (papp (pvar f) va) (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

    
n: val
valid (pval n) (ens res. \[res = n])
 apply sem_pval.
    
x: ident
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
v: val
H: derivable e1 f1
H0: flow_res f1 v
H1: derivable (subst x v e2) f2
IHforward1: valid e1 f1
IHforward2: valid (subst x v e2) f2
valid (plet x e1 e2) (f1;; f2)
 eapply sem_plet; eauto.
    
b: val
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
H: derivable e1 f1
H0: derivable e2 f2
IHforward1: valid e1 f1
IHforward2: valid e2 f2
valid (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)
 apply sem_pif; auto.
    
x: Staged.loc
valid (pderef (vloc x))
  (∀ y : Val.val,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))
 apply sem_pderef.
    
v: val
valid (pref v)
  (∃ y : Staged.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))
 apply sem_pref.
    
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
valid (passign (vloc x) y)
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))
 apply sem_passign.
    
b: bool
valid (passert (vbool b)) (req_ \[b = true])
 apply sem_passert.
    
vf: val
x: ident
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H: vf = vfun x e
H0: derivable (subst x va e) f
IHforward: valid (subst x va e) f
valid (papp (pval vf) va) f
 eapply sem_papp_fun; eauto.
    
vf: val
x: ident
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
fn: ident
H: vf = vfix fn x e
H0: derivable (subst x va (subst fn vf e)) f
IHforward: valid (subst x va (subst fn vf e)) f
valid (papp (pval vf) va) f
 eapply sem_papp_fix; eauto.
    
f: ident
va: val
valid (papp (pvar f) va) (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))
 eapply sem_papp_unk.
  Qed.

End Soundness.

Module HistoryTriples.

  Import Soundness.

History triples
A history triple (i.e. not just a "triple", which typically refers to a Hoare triple) also constrains the history of a program. 
  Definition hist_triple fh e f :=
    forall penv env h0 h1 h2 v r,
      satisfies env h0 h1 r fh ->
      env_compatible penv env ->
      bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
      satisfies env h0 h2 (norm v) f.
History triples are contravariant in the history. 
  
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails)
     (respectful eq (respectful entails impl)))
  hist_triple

  
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails)
     (respectful eq (respectful entails impl)))
  hist_triple

    
forall x y : flow,
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= x) ->
forall x0 y0 : expr,
x0 = y0 ->
forall x1 y1 : flow,
(forall (env : env) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y1) ->
(forall
   (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
   (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
   (r : result),
 env, h0, h1, r |= x ->
 env_compatible penv env ->
 bigstep penv h1 x0 h2 (enorm v) ->
 env, h0, h2, norm v |= x1) ->
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= y ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 y0 h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= y1

H0: x0 = y0
x1, y1: flow

env, h1, h2, r |= x1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y1

  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))

bigstep penv h1 x0 h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= x1

env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H3: env0, h0, h1, r |= y
H4: env_compatible penv0 env0
H5: bigstep penv0 h1 y0 h2 (enorm v)
env0, h0, h2, norm v |= y1

  (respectful bientails

forall x y : flow,
bientails x y ->
forall x0 y0 : expr,
x0 = y0 ->
forall x1 y1 : flow,
bientails x1 y1 ->
(forall
   (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
   (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
   (r : result),
 env, h0, h1, r |= x ->
 env_compatible penv env ->
 bigstep penv h1 x0 h2 (enorm v) ->
 env, h0, h2, norm v |= x1) ->
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= y ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 y0 h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= y1

env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H3: env0, h0, h1, r |= y
H4: env_compatible penv0 env0
H5: bigstep penv0 h1 y0 h2 (enorm v)
bigstep penv0 h1 y0 h2 (enorm v)

    exact H5.
  Qed.
Structural rules 
  
forall (f1 f2 f3 f4 : flow) (e : expr),
f1 ⊑ f3 ->
f4 ⊑ f2 -> hist_triple f3 e f4 -> hist_triple f1 e f2

  
forall (f1 f2 f3 f4 : flow) (e : expr),
f1 ⊑ f3 ->
f4 ⊑ f2 -> hist_triple f3 e f4 -> hist_triple f1 e f2

    
forall (f1 f2 f3 f4 : flow) (e : expr),
f1 ⊑ f3 ->
f4 ⊑ f2 ->
(forall
   (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
   (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
   (r : result),
 env, h0, h1, r |= f3 ->
 env_compatible penv env ->
 bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
 env, h0, h2, norm v |= f4) ->
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= f1 ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f2
 
f1, f2, f3, f4: flow
e: expr
He1: f1 ⊑ f3
He2: f4 ⊑ f2
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= f3 ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f4
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= f1 ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f2
 
f1, f2, f3, f4: flow
e: expr
He1: f1 ⊑ f3
He2: f4 ⊑ f2
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= f3 ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f4
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hf1: env0, h0, h1, r |= f1
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env0, h0, h2, norm v |= f2

    
f1, f2, f3, f4: flow
e: expr
He1: f1 ⊑ f3
He2: f4 ⊑ f2
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= f3 ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f4
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hf1: env0, h0, h1, r |= f3
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env0, h0, h2, norm v |= f2

    specializes H Hf1 Hc.
  Qed.

  
forall (fh fr f : flow) (e : expr),
hist_triple fh e f -> hist_triple (fr;; fh) e (fr;; f)

  
forall (fh fr f : flow) (e : expr),
hist_triple fh e f -> hist_triple (fr;; fh) e (fr;; f)

    
forall (fh fr f : flow) (e : expr),
(forall
   (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
   (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
   (r : result),
 env, h0, h1, r |= fh ->
 env_compatible penv env ->
 bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
 env, h0, h2, norm v |= f) ->
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fr;; fh) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= (fr;; f)

forall (f : flow) (e : expr),
sem_tuple e f <-> hist_triple empty e f

  
forall (f : flow) (e : expr),
sem_tuple e f <-> hist_triple empty e f

The (arbitrary) result of the history does not matter, enabling this rewriting. 
  
forall (fh f : flow) (e : expr),
hist_triple (fh;; empty) e f -> hist_triple fh e f

  
forall (fh f : flow) (e : expr),
hist_triple (fh;; empty) e f -> hist_triple fh e f

    
forall (fh f : flow) (e : expr),
(forall
   (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
   (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
   (r : result),
 env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
 env_compatible penv env ->
 bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
 env, h0, h2, norm v |= f) ->
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= fh ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f

  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),

Hseq: (exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env0, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
   env0, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty) ->
env0, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
env0, h0, h2, norm v |= f

   env0, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\

env0, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)

e: expr
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) 
  (v : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env0
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: env0, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
env0, h0, h2, norm v |= f
 
fh, f: flow
e: expr
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env0
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: (exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env0, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
   env0, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty) ->
env0, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
  env0, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty
 
fh, f: flow
e: expr
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env0
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: (exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env0, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
   env0, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty) ->
env0, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
exists r1 : result,
  env0, h0, h1, r1 |= fh /\
  env0, h1, h1, norm vunit |= empty
 
fh, f: flow
e: expr
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env0
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: (exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env0, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
   env0, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty) ->
env0, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
env0, h0, h1, r |= fh /\
env0, h1, h1, norm vunit |= empty
 
fh, f: flow
e: expr
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env0
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: (exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env0, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
   env0, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty) ->
env0, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
env0, h1, h1, norm vunit |= empty

      apply (empty_intro env0 h1). 
fh, f: flow
e: expr
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env0
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: env0, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
env0, h0, h2, norm v |= f

    specializes H Hseq H1 H2.
  Qed.
History triples which only append to history can be derived directly from the history-frame rule. 
  
forall (fh : flow) (e : expr) (f : flow),
sem_tuple e f -> hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

  
forall (fh : flow) (e : expr) (f : flow),
sem_tuple e f -> hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

    
fh: flow
e: expr
f: flow
H: sem_tuple e f
hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

    
fh: flow
e: expr
f: flow
H: hist_triple empty e f
hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

    
fh: flow
e: expr
f: flow
H: hist_triple empty e f
H3: hist_triple (fh;; empty) e (fh;; f)
hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)
 
fh: flow
e: expr
f: flow
H3: hist_triple (fh;; empty) e (fh;; f)
hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

    
fh: flow
e: expr
f: flow
H3: hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)
hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

    exact H3.
  Qed.
Rules for program constructs 
  
forall (n : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pval n) (fh;; ens res. \[res = n])

  
forall (n : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pval n) (fh;; ens res. \[res = n])

    
forall (n : val) (fh : flow)
  (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= fh ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= (fh;; ens res. \[res = n])
 
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
env0, h0, h2, norm v |= (fh;; ens res. \[res = n])

    
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env0, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
  env0, h3, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])
 
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
exists r1 : result,
  env0, h0, h1, r1 |= fh /\
  env0, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])
 
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result

Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
env0, h0, h1, r |= fh /\
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])

    
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)

n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
H: tuple_valid_under penv0 env0 
  (pval n) (ens res. \[res = n])
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])

    
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env0, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v) ->
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])
env0, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])

    apply H; auto.
  Qed.

  
forall (n : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pval n) (fh;; ens res. \[res = n])

  
forall (n : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pval n) (fh;; ens res. \[res = n])

    
n: val
fh: flow
hist_triple fh (pval n) (fh;; ens res. \[res = n])

    applys hist_frame_sem (@sem_pval n).
  Qed.

  
forall (v : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pref v)
  (fh;;
   ∃ y : Staged.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

  
forall (v : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pref v)
  (fh;;
   ∃ y : Staged.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

    
v: val
fh: flow
hist_triple fh (pref v)
  (fh;;
   ∃ y : Staged.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

    applys hist_frame_sem (@sem_pref v).
  Qed.

  
forall (x : Staged.loc) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pderef (vloc x))
  (fh;;
   ∀ y : Val.val,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

  
forall (x : Staged.loc) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pderef (vloc x))
  (fh;;
   ∀ y : Val.val,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

    
x: Staged.loc
fh: flow
hist_triple fh (pderef (vloc x))
  (fh;;
   ∀ y : Val.val,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

    applys hist_frame_sem (@sem_pderef x).
  Qed.

  
forall (x : Staged.loc) (y : val) (v : Val.val)
  (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (passign (vloc x) y)
  (fh;; req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

  
forall (x : Staged.loc) (y : val) (v : Val.val)
  (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (passign (vloc x) y)
  (fh;; req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

    
x: Staged.loc
y: val
v: Val.val
fh: flow
hist_triple fh (passign (vloc x) y)
  (fh;; req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

    applys hist_frame_sem (@sem_passign x).
  Qed.

  
forall (fh : flow) (b : bool),
hist_triple fh (passert (vbool b))
  (fh;; req_ \[b = true])

  
forall (fh : flow) (b : bool),
hist_triple fh (passert (vbool b))
  (fh;; req_ \[b = true])

    
fh: flow
b: bool
hist_triple fh (passert (vbool b))
  (fh;; req_ \[b = true])

    applys hist_frame_sem (@sem_passert b).
  Qed.

  
forall (fh : flow) (b : bool) (e1 e2 : expr)
  (f1 f2 : flow),
hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = true]) e1 f1 ->
hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = false]) e2 f2 ->
hist_triple fh (pif (vbool b) e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

  
forall (fh : flow) (b : bool) (e1 e2 : expr)
  (f1 f2 : flow),
hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = true]) e1 f1 ->
hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = false]) e2 f2 ->
hist_triple fh (pif (vbool b) e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

    
fh: flow
b: bool
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
He1: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = true]) e1 f1
He2: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = false]) e2 f2
hist_triple fh (pif (vbool b) e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

    
fh: flow
b: bool
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
He1: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = true]) e1 f1
He2: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = false]) e2 f2
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= fh ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 (pif (vbool b) e1 e2) h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

b: bool
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
He1: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = true]) e1 f1
He2: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = false]) e2 f2

  (enorm v)
env0, h0, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

bigstep ?TEMP ?TEMP2 e1 ?TEMP3 (enorm ?TEMP4)

env0, h0, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result

H0: env_compatible penv0 env0
H1: bigstep penv0 h1 (pif (vbool true) e1 e2) h2
  (enorm v)
env0, h1, ?TEMP2, ?TEMP5 |= ens_ \[true = true]

  (* TODO alternative formulation of if, which appends only *)
  (* TODO sem_pif should treat conditions more precisely first *)

  
forall (vf : val) (x : ident) (e : expr) (va : val)
  (f fh : flow),
vf = vfun x e ->
hist_triple fh (subst x va e) f ->
hist_triple fh (papp (pval vf) va) f

  
forall (vf : val) (x : ident) (e : expr) (va : val)
  (f fh : flow),
vf = vfun x e ->
hist_triple fh (subst x va e) f ->
hist_triple fh (papp (pval vf) va) f

forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : env) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= fh ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 (papp (pval (vfun x e)) va) h2
  (enorm v) -> env, h0, h2, norm v |= f

forall (f : ident) (va : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (papp (pvar f) va)
  (fh;; ∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

  
forall (f : ident) (va : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (papp (pvar f) va)
  (fh;; ∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

    
f: ident
va: val
fh: flow
hist_triple fh (papp (pvar f) va)
  (fh;; ∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

    applys hist_frame_sem fh (@sem_papp_unk f va).
  Qed.

  
forall (fh : flow) (e1 : expr) (f1 : flow) (e2 : expr)
  (f2 : flow) (v : val) (x : ident),
hist_triple fh e1 f1 ->
flow_res f1 v ->
hist_triple f1 (subst x v e2) f2 ->
hist_triple fh (plet x e1 e2) f2

  (f2 : flow) (v : val) (x : ident),
hist_triple fh e1 f1 ->
flow_res f1 v ->
hist_triple f1 (subst x v e2) f2 ->
hist_triple fh (plet x e1 e2) f2

    (* reason about the execution of e2 *)
    
fh: flow
e1: expr

e2: expr

v: val
x: ident
He2: forall (penv : Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))) (env : env)
(h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v0 : val) (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= f1 ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 (subst x v e2) h2 (enorm v0) -> env, h0, h2, norm v0 |= f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap ident (option (val -> expr))
env0: env
h0, h1, h2: heap
v0: val
r: result

Hc: env_compatible penv0 env0
h4: heap
He1: env0, h0, h4, norm v |= f1
Hb2: bigstep penv0 h4 (subst x v e2) h2 (enorm v0)
Hb1: bigstep penv0 h1 e1 h4 (enorm v)
env0, h0, h2, norm v0 |= f2

    specializes He2 He1 Hc.
  Qed.

End HistoryTriples.

Module ForwardExamples.

  (* let x = 1 in x *)
  Definition e1_let := (plet "x" (pval (vint 1)) (pvar "x")).
  Definition f1 :=
    ens (fun v => \[v = vint 1]) ;;
    ens (fun r => \[r = vint 1]).

  
forward e1_let f1

  
forward e1_let f1

    
forward (pval (vint 1)) (ens v. \[v = vint 1])
flow_res (ens v. \[v = vint 1]) ?v
forward (subst "x" ?v (pvar "x"))
  (ens r. \[r = vint 1])

    
forward (pval (vint 1)) (ens v. \[v = vint 1])
 apply fw_val.
    
flow_res (ens v. \[v = vint 1]) ?v
 
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : env) (v1 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens v. \[v = vint 1]) ->
v1 = ?v

      
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1: val
H: env0, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens v. \[v = vint 1])
v1 = ?v

      
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1: val
H: v1 = vint 1 /\ h1 = h2
v1 = ?v

      
h1, h2: heap
env0: env
v1: val
H: v1 = vint 1
H0: h1 = h2
v1 = ?v

      exact H.
    
forward (subst "x" (vint 1) (pvar "x"))
  (ens r. \[r = vint 1])
 
forward (pval (vint 1)) (ens r. \[r = vint 1])

      apply fw_val.
  Qed.

End ForwardExamples.

Correspondence with the paper

Section 3.1. Semantics of staged formulae

The semantics of staged formulae is given as satisfies.
There are a number of differences from the paper:
  • An environment is added to give interpretations for unknown functions (a similar one is added to the big-step semantics)
  • Stores are removed to sidestep impredicativity problems, and replaced with substitution
  • The definition of req is different, restoring its contravariance

Section 3.2. Compaction

Compaction is really just entailment, so soundness (Theorem 1) is ensured by construction.
The six rules in Fig 7:
  • norm_ens_false_l
  • norm_empty_l
  • norm_empty_r
  • norm_req_req
  • norm_ens_ens_void_l
  • norm_ens_req_transpose

Section 4. Forward rules

The reasoning rules for programs are first presented as a more primitive relation forward between programs and staged formulae, without history. The validity of these rules for each program construct is defined as a collection of semantic tuples sem_tuple (analogous to semantic triples), and soundness (Theorem 2) is explicitly proved, under a new env_compatible condition.
History triples (Fig 8) are then defined. Many of the resulting rules can be derived from semantic tuples using the structural history-frame rule hist_frame. History triples are also defined semantically and are hence sound by construction.
Other differences from the paper:
  • The assert rule takes a value (or expression, under ANF), not a heap formula. No expressiveness is lost as it's still possible to assert things about the content of heap locations by first reading them.
  • The fun/fix rules require function specifications to be given via triples, instead of via annotations in the syntax
  • The let rule substitutes (a symbolic value) into the program, instead of quantifying free variables
  • The value of the location that deref retrieves is universally quantified, to match the new definition for req

Section 5. Entailment

Entailment is defined semantically, so soundness (Theorem 3) is ensured by construction.
The two entailment rules in the paper are shown to be sound.
  • ent_ens_seq
  • ent_req_seq
